social, racial, economic, and environmental justice for all.
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250709-movement.xK_-es&refcode=em20250709-1419&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=1419%2E342411%2EBOHuH1 ]We rely on grassroots support — not special interests — to power our
movement. Our average donation this month is just $17. Can you chip in $17
to help power our fight for progress? Chip in.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1419%2E342411%2EBOHuH1

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: The White House is taking a chainsaw to Virginia jobs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
They aren't just numbers on a spreadsheet. They're human beings who have families to provide for and bills to pay.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111177300/556485673/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-07-09_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWU1ODE1OGMtMjI1ZC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kIS4mdBWK5rpAjCtoHCjYQ5y_kcIwXg7RS4aHTmfhxE=)
---
| Peter, a new report shows that Virginia's unemployment rate has increased for five straight months. Not since the Great Recession have we experienced a streak this long.

Everywhere I go, I hear from Virginia workers and families affected by these job cuts.

**But they aren't just numbers on a spreadsheet.** They're moms and dads who have bills to pay and kids to feed.

My opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears, cheers on what the White House has been doing — taking a _chainsaw_ to Virginia jobs. She says "do not fret" to laid-off federal workers as her administration provides nothing more to help than guidance on how to update your resume. In many cases, these are career public servants whose livelihoods have just been decimated.

It's totally unacceptable.

Clearly, she's going to keep running a slash-and-burn campaign that plays on people's fears and promotes disinformation.

As a top supporter, I need your help to reach voters with the truth and win at the ballot box.

[_**Will you make a contribution today? Donations of all amounts help us set the record straight and keep our focus on lowering costs and creating opportunities for every Virginian.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111177301/556485674/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-07-09_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWU1ODE1OGMtMjI1ZC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kIS4mdBWK5rpAjCtoHCjYQ5y_kcIwXg7RS4aHTmfhxE=)

clean_body: They aren't just numbers on a spreadsheet. They're human beings who have families to provide for and bills to pay. | = | Peter, a new report shows that Virginia's unemployment rate has increased for five straight months. Not since the Great Recession have we experienced a streak this long. Everywhere I go, I hear from Virginia workers and families affected by these job cuts. But they aren't just numbers on a spreadsheet. They're moms and dads who have bills to pay and kids to feed. My opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears, cheers on what the White House has been doing — taking a chainsaw to Virginia jobs. She says "do not fret" to laid-off federal workers as her administration provides nothing more to help than guidance on how to update your resume. In many cases, these are career public servants whose livelihoods have just been decimated. It's totally unacceptable. Clearly, she's going to keep running a slash-and-burn campaign that plays on people's fears and promotes disinformation. As a top supporter, I need your help to reach voters with the truth and win at the ballot box. = | | = | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you so much, Abigail * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

name: AOC
subject: Donald Trump is not an aberration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
If we are to defeat him, we must defeat the system that created him.
#
Just look at what Republicans have been doing in Congress.
They have been voting to advance cuts on hundreds of billions of dollars from Medicaid, veterans benefits, and Social Security **so that they can give it to the billionaires who elected them** , in the form of tax cuts and sweetheart government contracts to companies like SpaceX.
They know that it is deeply unpopular. They know that it hurts you.
But they are not here to serve us. They are here to serve themselves and the billionaires who have paid them. **Oligarchy**.
They know that the only chance they have to get away with such an unpopular agenda — to get away with stealing in plain view — is to stoke deep divisions among us along lines of race, identity, and culture to keep us distracted.
This has been the Big Money Playbook — not just now, but for generations.
And that is why **Donald Trump is not an aberration**.
He is the logical and inevitable conclusion to an American political system that has been dominated by corporate and dark money.
And if we are here to defeat him, **we must defeat the system that created him**.
**That means that we choose to out-organize the oligarchy**. We will, and we must, do away with the power of big money in our politics.
[Will you contribute $5 right now to help us host more town halls and power our fight on the road? Every dollar helps us mobilize, organize, and fight for the working class in the places that need it most.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250709.qWMTYL&refcode=em20250709-9277-P_FND_EGR_FO&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9277%2E2526796%2E7RRNqj)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250709.qWMTYL&refcode=em20250709-9277-P_FND_EGR_FO&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=9277%2E2526796%2E7RRNqj)**
More soon,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250709?refcode=em20250709-9277-P_FND_EGR_FO&t=21&refcode2=9277_2526796_7RRNqj&akid=9277%2E2526796%2E7RRNqj)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250709-9277-P_FND_EGR_FO&t=22&akid=9277%2E2526796%2E7RRNqj)**

name: Senator Rick Scott
subject: I have an announcement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC
body:
Former Governor - now Senator Rick Scott, endorses Senator Tommy Tuberville for Governor
| [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=3d3aa42cea6346e881287a9f6be42e84&_e=FgDBkO0MTotSGVq5598wDF7JYVWrTT8nh6UB7MKyGB8VavFmIv_nT403AxRO_woaLc_9Z6yZsn9ZCckdyIBS9lHuhoy-16IC8Gd6zxKEUrHmxrh46ftAl3nLlrgFBV_uugG7ginKGPHEQklvmikE88wMQJOhzGO06O7L9zt1WFFEvpq50q7Dp02BCkWiCb0D2xtt6FD9ERqH2gd-ohG_fpYHWYkGyHg_Lb8jnUVoDO3o4ula2-33a3k-QmmGeDpSH8wv4F2jVhThxO-NiPD0pstFetIDQNQiukY1cnVhLB5ysWwmQLplKg7KzezYPEzZAR2SIJzuqNn2KS0iYjyVdyF2-Qo56UyuFZtjRaE5Hya17o4YMzkYu1FfLqHahs05YujejTZflRgJwY6v1hWgyShhahKFGFRBcYPJg7ASOkiau-98j6n-FkVLwBQaZRYpBQkUAVjoOZcVCmIEJV4wNaBatiMGXRMxgRw5kUeBam68si6E5ZxUPRs72qQ5ZtRBU9-0H-DqvCV75AKRRDSTLnN_Lwrhjg5-QERgECGggh3052vr6w60W4QK0zMC_wuQ)
---
Peter,

I've served with **Coach Tommy Tuberville** in the U.S. Senate. I've watched him fight for our military, for our families, and for the values that make America strong.

And I'm proud to endorse him for **Governor of Alabama.**

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=3d3aa42cea6346e881287a9f6be42e84&_e=FgDBkO0MTotSGVq5598wDF7JYVWrTT8nh6UB7MKyGB8VavFmIv_nT403AxRO_woaLc_9Z6yZsn9ZCckdyIBS9lHuhoy-16IC8Gd6zxKEUrHmxrh46ftAl3nLlrgFBV_uugG7ginKGPHEQklvmikE81ROEX42h2u6pbz6dvfQj9FLxDsvuMGuL5W31K_hzLR8l9yC7JI_opRAgCGKQnqoUIJeUxt9ByMiCMug8V1DtWzctl7-thU8gcHTmBCY_O3vovQ6NJcWFP5mk2EwcZjGCgokUS4kElyQ_0LwuazBQcvSaRGSf1DOClrRosJXtHdZZvXLWpRmj6bAAM16Q9SvPrMWn6zMF3YSDMajthmAmk659NqsXNV_5GaicDOYOyhFH5cqlBYr5ntFCCLdyhjRFdFtBMXrsuQ6UNc6akCZ4wlimcuVfenrDOJ2W6UothSY_vOqZXMIH1zXvf_yCm_o5Qi5rcaF1H8TB_grZNK2fZJku0NB6BV4-YHoyakVbOzOTUHPU-dR2NL6dXYsRQ2nu951RYUg23H4cnDMveQe_K8%3D) | [ **ENDORSE COACH TUBERVILLE** ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=3d3aa42cea6346e881287a9f6be42e84&_e=FgDBkO0MTotSGVq5598wDF7JYVWrTT8nh6UB7MKyGB8VavFmIv_nT403AxRO_woaLc_9Z6yZsn9ZCckdyIBS9lHuhoy-16IC8Gd6zxKEUrHmxrh46ftAl3nLlrgFBV_uugG7ginKGPHEQklvmikE8_8CbHXqWkvg7XpsB8yXeyHyHVAgHMjDNna_LphwZutf923RWAVQ30FDi0wDIlSIQA_KtCTbvoPcu63JimAfLx9H-PZ0df5KSdmDwujTQ7supA-W3O_-Kl319Edt_9T4hnHzKyI9Nkmtm2chf6VLY_wUDjFK_MpdlosJi9gf7GzLE2nudvSzXN9yd6wpQ5AWgEarpWzesXY3RUe1_56nNIgFUwtCpWbpMaUVUv4hIjKWF0_bj2vHjRd2z7OxE7bOw56sQFeiqNc49-5NBSDgm2rAkLlpXoPR_MLNre35rIvO1OSDerHMnwb0lIS8rMtadUYfTFeHGQqBxE4fTzBQCUB5c9AVK8q9sXA2uFMBL6uhaV5Il3kD4sOhITRbA3P-LyzP2tjilhPDL-KKsTknHvtZgACf_e5a-8qQBEz5VAZP)
---

Coach Tuberville didn't come to Washington for headlines or praise -- he came to work. And that's exactly what he did.

He took bold stands. He fought to **block Biden 's radical Pentagon agenda.** He stood up to the Left when it tried to turn our military into a woke experiment. And he never stopped fighting for the conservative principles Alabama families believe in.

_That kind of backbone is rare in politics. That 's why it's so important we send him to Montgomery.

_I know what it takes to be a governor. I ran Florida like a business -- cutting taxes, creating jobs, and getting rid of waste. Tommy Tuberville has that same mindset. He's disciplined, strategic, and tough as nails.

He knows what it means to build a winning team -- on the field, in the Senate, and soon, in the Governor's Office.

**[But he’s going to need your support.](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=3d3aa42cea6346e881287a9f6be42e84&_e=FgDBkO0MTotSGVq5598wDF7JYVWrTT8nh6UB7MKyGB8VavFmIv_nT403AxRO_woaLc_9Z6yZsn9ZCckdyIBS9lHuhoy-16IC8Gd6zxKEUrHmxrh46ftAl3nLlrgFBV_uugG7ginKGPHEQklvmikE88wMQJOhzGO06O7L9zt1WFFEvpq50q7Dp02BCkWiCb0DiT75jcyY5RVWiropBtIVLWCNh2ANMfRhYHWJNKoLH8clBBzAcRBmQstv5j2N_BOgr-q-H02mVN97yzmj0q7bxSRcVqPcsWC3tIYV0oBRcilk6Iwmn73ASURNqlV6E8SMibtYLEOCsvYMmlMQDO4B8ThV6cPH5bOa8fMKizGgF2KU-eUk_6YfdqZTDS6WtM6OeYYZUrU-o8Vs66sGCeJBzvgrtWF9VqhdOteaODGiRoPCtBftzU1JYe49n0I4hX7f6BFdMFKbeBewaMyxlwSRxQ3s0YkpANMnAaxIX28-5AfSHLlsY2ANyU3ymyPM8Rv9xivVhrSa8D_ueLgLZEBkhA3MQb1J2sUrbU8o20LAIh3zTrPL4H_sJQRKoLQ_AauX)** The Left is already gearing up to flip Alabama with out-of-state money and radical ideas.

Let's make sure they fail.

**[Pitch in now to help Coach Tuberville win this race and lead Alabama with courage and integrity.
](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=3d3aa42cea6346e881287a9f6be42e84&_e=FgDBkO0MTotSGVq5598wDF7JYVWrTT8nh6UB7MKyGB8VavFmIv_nT403AxRO_woaLc_9Z6yZsn9ZCckdyIBS9lHuhoy-16IC8Gd6zxKEUrHmxrh46ftAl3nLlrgFBV_uugG7ginKGPHEQklvmikE81ROEX42h2u6pbz6dvfQj9FLxDsvuMGuL5W31K_hzLR8THU4nDIxWdT4NkPK8KGWSX3IxuEu1x-85u_okx4lZR8dr1mkGU2AZX4qeESZ8oeyg530T9jJlbTgt7vLu8417nToHxp_upzCuPAKAuUQh1zFGeMm-VMPsl3HxjA7a2auF8VEGvhXid4GHhu7aDBGswENbBlVTGg4Ke29Kzpw3-C7FSTdJczUbmoqcuJDSy99vvkh_UJ8RR_YEDx0iUPluNw7OEaF1d-QS51YvIcNg20M5Tw1pfFVRJGmD4J-vfduW83oBj_OBKyH86j8ApAuRUbUfUBikB3ti-ZPLVeFIAXxaLzryzh3zPRrW3ttqe8Jn0ECBc94irsJmlK7E0tCCg5bK7fvdSstNIRktRlaihg%3D)**
I trust Tommy Tuberville. And I know Alabama will be in good hands with him as Governor.

Let's get this done.

For America,
**Rick Scott**
U.S. Senator, Florida
Former Governor of Florida

PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC
PO Box 43124 Birmingham, AL 35243

subject: The One Big Beautiful Bill: Honoring the Promise of America

Reform with Purpose, Hope with Action

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us16.campaign-archive.com/?e=8763c56857&u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=803769f2c5)

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | “America’s best days are still ahead of us.” – Ronald Reagan
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| **The One Big Beautiful Bill:****Honoring the Promise of America**
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
# _Opinion_ | The One Big Beautiful Bill: A Shrill Democratic Lament
---
| _By Dominic Rapini, American Businessman and Political Commentator_
**WASHINGTON, D.C.** – In a shocking turn of events, the dastardly One Big Beautiful Bill has passed, and we, the nation’s proud, pint-sized, and perpetually shrill Democrats, are here to wail, gnash our teeth, and warn you about the coming apocalypse—by which we mean, of course, tax cuts for people who actually work for a living.
**Top 10 Catastrophes (a.k.a. “Benefits”) for the Working Class**
1\. T**ax Cuts for the Poors?** How dare they! The largest proportional tax cuts go to families making $15,000 to $30,000. That’s money they could have been sending to Washington for us to redistribute more inefficiently! 2\. **Standard Deduction Boosted** —Now What?The deduction goes up by $1,500. So now 91% of Americans can file their taxes without needing a PhD in accounting. Where’s the fun in that? 3.**No Tax on Tips** —Waitresses Might SmileFour million tipped workers get to keep their tips. Next thing you know, they’ll be able to afford avocado toast AND rent. 4\. **No Tax on Overtime** —More Money for the MassesEighty million hourly workers get to keep their overtime pay. We can already hear the sound of union bosses sobbing into their soy lattes. 5\. **Child Tax Credit Expanded** —Kids EverywhereThe Child Tax Credit jumps to $2,200. That’s more money for families, and probably more kids named “Liberty” and “Freedom.” Ugh. 6\. **Take-Home Pay Increases** —Workers Might SmileTypical families get up to $10,900 more per year. How will we convince people they’re oppressed if they’re flush with cash? 7.**Job Creation** —A Plague of Employment7.2 million jobs protected or created, including 1.4 million in manufacturing. We prefer our unemployment lines long and our talking points longer. 8.**Tax Relief for Seniors** —Grandma Buys a Jet SkiSeniors get an extra $6,000 deduction. Great, now they’ll be out there living their best lives instead of writing angry letters to Congress. 9.**Small Business Support** —Entrepreneurs UnleashedPermanent tax cuts and expanded expensing for small businesses. Next thing you know, someone will open a gluten-free, solar-powered, artisanal pickle shop on every corner. 10.**Savings Accounts for All** —Personal Responsibility?Trump savings accounts and expanded HSAs. The horror! People might start planning for their own futures instead of relying on government.
**Medicare “Reform” (Or: How We Learned to Stop Worrying and Love Eligibility)**
1.**Eligibility Tightened** —Aliens Need Not ApplyOnly lawful residents, select immigrants, and certain compact citizens can get Medicare. So much for our “Medicare for Martians” platform. 2.**Working Seniors Get More HSA Love** Seniors who keep working can keep saving. We much prefer the “retire, expire, and vote absentee” model. 3.**Bigger HSA Contributions for the Little Guy** Lower-income folks can save more for healthcare. We always said we wanted more savings—just not like this! 4.**Rural Hospitals Reopened** —Country Folk SurviveClosed rural hospitals can reopen. There goes our plan to centralize all healthcare in Brooklyn. 5\. **AI Fights Medicare Fraud** —Robots Take Our Jobs$25 million for AI to prevent fraud. We were hoping to unionize the fraudsters, but whatever.
**Top 5 Myths (That We Totally Still Believe)**
**1.“It’s Just for Billionaires!”** Sure, the biggest cuts go to the working class, but billionaires exist, and we can’t just let them be happy.
**2.“It Kicks People Off Medicaid!”** Except it doesn’t. But if we say it loud enough, maybe someone will believe us.
**3.“It Explodes the Deficit!”** Actually, it cuts the deficit by $2 trillion, but math is hard and yelling is easy.
**4.“Work Requirements Are Cruel!”** Only for able-bodied adults without kids, but we’re pretty sure “work” is a four-letter word.
**5.“It Makes Life Unaffordable!”** Except for the $10,000+ in extra take-home pay, lower taxes, and cheaper energy. But who’s counting?
**A Big, Beautiful, Hopeful Future** But you know what? Maybe, just maybe, the future looks... well, Big, Beautiful, and Bright. Maybe more jobs, more money, and more opportunity means fewer people need to listen to us shriek about doom and gloom. Maybe America will thrive, families will prosper, and even we, the shrillest of Democrats, will find something to smile about—like a new artisanal pickle shop, opened by a newly prosperous working-class entrepreneur.
**So here’s to a future that’s Big, Beautiful, and Bright—even if it means we’ll have to find new things to complain about**

name: Must Read Texas
subject: MRT 7/9/25 (free) (sponsored by 1440 Media): Flood Death Toll Nears 120 // Employment Aid Now Available in Kerr County // Abbott Orders Expanded Special Session Call // TEA to Release. A-F from '24

* **CENTRAL TEXAS FLOODING NEWS**

**“Texas flood death toll nears 120 as searchers scour debris for the missing,”** Dallas Morning News'**Alex Nguyen** ,**Matt Kyle** ,**Karen Brooks Harper** and the Associated Press**** — “Nearly a week after [heavy rain and flooding](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eOQPXJLmqZGCIlkWp25_d_mRfrsNGXltMxC1ltSg0Zb1tVgvDic70hKiTm6_YaK_ZVwmenw_ZxIeiGaAso9VJi5xDFiDiGUGIDcqCbExmPjIFvnZJ4a_xFA3qBgT5Ibmc2jlU0cXHLjBIOdbV_H_P6orOZXi6FwOy8CoHibJ6bZ5jtUcBgW77GpZjAledoJvwKpnI4mxDe_KDX7KZjxBaVpybx8lhZoFnV1B9eXXoI2iO_FZNgavUwZiRDRQpkVzEzTGDaZ98nEKIcqA7QQfYA0G7wBEczNjTJOgjt6ThXeatjUqC0z_L8swJEeXqncdUch2XRDPPjGzfXTjw6om6CkxJOs6KdUvjJqtXUIl2LNcuIWuGWCN32Q_KqIUNsHLWqAkCJxpuFjGHSuWfYWfJ913kg9fVt0UmUxIfGoz9qa0OlFhrvH7fa_aW0B9dsH0U3AkJZg7QqS9mrqioOqsRjWUkxPelFM-iyGHKfq-KMQylnwEGGLC38FjG0diQxHlVjV0krIH-gjInk4GiLwUYULpoKGKvd3yd_lahMBBWOoL-gcy2REV_qUnAWj8ya1a8A/4i2/6jSs_sbWRhisAFPkIiNFnw/h14/h001.H6RI9h9aBa6IpmFdR_nkS7Fzd6rwzIbmHnO-G0bOtcg) hit the Texas Hill Country, the search continued Wednesday for an untold number of missing people.

Officials warned that the full [extent of the catastrophe](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eOQPXJLmqZGCIlkWp25_d_mRfrsNGXltMxC1ltSg0Zb1TNMbVQurFb1IRVHCxLQOj15cUyIsjUYP77YfDe_RojxhkhbE3se9dM4GpUaetxmmjGQOmqHl5UOwSJ3Epa1UY9bAB4_77ZSGHlr_D7hhuFBqVoyoxxrzJTp4sFTS-7RBNytJMr8JzpJ3qPJJOAoOy-3ljz5nbgdvcenyh6qCYkpp3lX0frRw7HikFZ2sR24bGwuT4dk0KbRy-DTd8B5L1fcQAb8o-NDqcaILJFWxmsLZ9Nds5ingRqzdZRZFmWtk-1f8h3NivTnzCvDrLCCaajaFRg2mawqBcAIK41IauG4fZ9zWaSYyaCytGqAfEo_XPt-CLSwqoFJMXh_Lr6mUXbGs5q38fi5CGpLCAsWT56yuMWQXBaZTDZMt6AB5Aawwslzh5qkECK8oGRM24PJBObsb2XnhrkxSQLkU4Tdi9QONy7aGzTSrgQo9pdIvzByM75iC8WLBga8RutUzOSftXAQAFe7aI2vqgxkX8oCxydlHgxJk5nMxGcBA64wJ1PdVlXcEZwPWYYUHvAOalwHaJQ/4i2/6jSs_sbWRhisAFPkIiNFnw/h15/h001.kyZcuOYIX9ySfIKI9-g2OgKr5Nj3tpuqcIwhBqSGXCg) had yet to be revealed and unaccounted victims could still be found amid the massive piles of debris in the area that stretch for miles. The first four focus on flood warning systems, flood emergency communications, relief funding for Hill Country floods as well as natural disaster preparation and recovery.

“There is more work to be done, particularly in the aftermath of the devastating floods in the Texas Hill Country,” he said in a news release. “We must ensure better preparation for such events in the future.”

In addition, the governor [ordered](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.gXT_7YSi5DEU9NdvjtCBTB5u5fAxhb5ox6Y46a0lfwX7LcS3h0W9BWihGeS3pPiHZFE0XKuLZUIqmfaxw0cO_rQsbDXx0RIFOqKrG_eB5EXanOj2vudwADfwkqR6vZ6TFcJReBhs1bqgZ-bjgdTNwUqZcTvfMDCCUYXj_bYuwAvRWtdpXMPJnr5IIi36il7s64n5VSVjN1OTl8uqeihdZWbSngdfs4rxpdGZIRWCJhDKh8XXIi0zXCwrnxThXqpNVWiYnQDXUf66tEgsOcl62w3mWpq196CgGpCz66Z3BX2v1_mx9IQ-GFIU3qh47P2NxBq7utfgSiFbq9HAwWPt0_TwEMb3C61fSMghZBmi4cwWJOr-8qy9jte6tA4mD8Cxs_0FJcX78jp6nMa5cvhq4GZH-CG-qqtFoVgTDCNbKnE3Ah02GibH9Qtm_epQs1Dys03b3GU2ESEzkKXDi43bESzeUjbmvPYV-xUG9CqhuOwc3QwCJJZbX6ow6nyGx-tIfFQd5up_u9sDe1JnX1TitAzu8F5nvrbksQxSh9r_aZxufp3S-EXIgdmYfpDYPLBY8hiB30WIcpDUbW9Sl-gR3shGrpgRl4iB6hIfWaeOw6j8kn6LTvSv7PW4aPQUBrRfir2xCv9iKdmlKQ5NHJqJTrW66a2a5LCLrncidl3aKhHtUMYLy5D-QQQ9rwFQ9dhZQTlcwV9zbNWXrylEGzeODnCghjeJGGR8yJxgIPss81wDnIE69uZxTXq2ttC9k4Js1ED7ZeOjxfYvq8pQyReK5A/4i2/6jSs_sbWRhisAFPkIiNFnw/h22/h001.aUIHagEAVX5KX1Mxx_-MX_BlhuOQagI_1uE0L9ztJGg) Texas flags across the state to be lowered to half-staff in honor of the victims and families who suffered an “unimaginable loss,” after previously declaring [a statewide Day of Prayer](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.BZwRK1EP7g9GmaFmW2OMxsR4ypyZUEXyDTPoLFj00rjkuweqVcdxhvRl8tzA2vsSvd4Pbv-fRVG1ZQ2HGXatiWQcwu8b4a8BKtO4gWC1_wHMHlE_jr6IRIK87s8GuMNBs1Rg3NKjY4UjFhqtgfrP9MswSR8MgWbBt12j74dbemq-5OFMAz0SFkKIW9MQ1mDpnZsHDgdqsH-Sr31eyA_9qngJYE2uiR0nVMPFLzkKqrbI3RJrm_4lcjoQljX2aT48WV9aO9Ghucnxf8Z6SrruzuvacClZg9wYnryB07o2GCzgclS3-NbRAeHwzgpduqiv1ivIl9BW4mPrjMF0VEZ2t0ozu71IP1imMWFvARF2sFBZqGZ3_ava3rMEcMnNen89Bn5SE7Kr2NWaL6ez3OpjpTQ39Nsz6skLBATuPUkGn4od2ySuM6pyhLQH6YEsp1SI9eZGPCnQGrRrRoukERU9DwaeNBV0d25m9Xlze5FNNZNM64uFMwDt24habnYZYH-qd-0_-iGu-X9pw91b7mryELCJSRtQ_LDKFQR-lU6tVnzZaHaWCipyYdDmHyw19usD/4i2/6jSs_sbWRhisAFPkIiNFnw/h23/h001.dxf_GkjciLvvhJreCaYO8y1xxIUaYSAPBYakf0JvCck) for Sunday.

Flags are expected to be returned to full-staff at sunrise on Monday, July 14, 2025.

Across the state, at least 119 people have died as of Wednesday. In addition to the 95 found dead in Kerr County, at least eight died in Kendall County, seven in Travis County, five in Burnett County, three in Williamson County and one in Tom Greene County.

Over 2,000 people have participated in search efforts, Leitha said, though officials said Tuesday that no live rescues have taken place since Friday.

Abbott said officials have been seeking more information about those who were in the state’s Hill Country during the Fourth of July holiday but did not register at a camp or a hotel and may have been in the area without sharing their whereabouts with others.

Crews in airboats, helicopters and on horseback along with [hundreds of volunteers](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.taRaxrEkWqxIZl3CYy7RU-8zPWZErbzsTpoOJuc75r2tRDaK7rvznBgzlCJ3HoVlgLc_zToVFC46kyCfhLhWc5aLNMQvkno67gfo6JApntWXuf3vYquZ0LbEecFxV3UTL5Lg6X8pLbzXdcaLYiU1XimN4rQE0DDUr2nrwKxkaMQcCU7bwXAgiDsFNOlrZNK6emt-GjGEg7z-CPWAlUZCoX5WgJ1buKgy6AANGZ6y3WTvX-wD2p0kZsEtIXB1_rDR6x7DsBB7YWrqoO_Q_auXA4ADylJWePN3_AuKLLb-woVxCqEnD8seX28RsMUoRSMzqOx0EgK5ScJ_I9D4nQ7ojLfv5ICDPa7YnQLKo2sqQlU0opba_CFFKLlSEUf2ilrBM7O0HvSK2KsZvYIr305PzPQNV5vghHbNIHTq2Y88tSK9J8RgfQlTeN8p-CzqUv0raRvIzeOHV7Y0K0oJSgrKocanYDcVzPv3GrqGfavBpHly5oS9Uwe3-gxiKjCCa9YE51M74CmQd2JqcVVVgi5ESxSz4OhDNIaryqOo3yl3ujg/4i2/6jSs_sbWRhisAFPkIiNFnw/h24/h001.sHNeg9PzAR-GRWKA2fm7jF9e1qvm_PJ8MYKqvIjrryg) are part of one of the largest search operations in Texas history.

“We have to find every single person who’s missing,” Abbott said in a Tuesday news release, “and that’s job No. 1.”

Many more could be unaccounted for, as out-of-towners visited the region for their Fourth of July holiday weekend. The governor urged anyone who believes a loved one could be missing due to the flood to call 830-258-1111 or report it online at kerrvillemissing@dps.texas.gov.

But with no survivors found since Friday, the total death toll across the Hill Country and Central Texas is likely to rise much higher than the 109 fatalities that Abbott announced Tuesday." Sign up now and invite your friends and family to be part of the informed. | CENTRAL TEXAS FLOODING NEWS “Texas flood death toll nears 120 as searchers scour debris for the missing,” Dallas Morning News'Alex Nguyen ,Matt Kyle ,Karen Brooks Harper and the Associated Press** — “Nearly a week after hit the Texas Hill Country, the search continued Wednesday for an untold number of missing people. Officials warned that the full had yet to be revealed and unaccounted victims could still be found amid the massive piles of debris in the area that stretch for miles. The National Weather Service once again issued for parts of the hard-hit region, including western Kerr County until 8 p.m. Wednesday. » Earlier in the day, Kerr County officials said at a news conference that at least in Kerr County, pushing the death toll to nearly 120 people across Texas. Kerr County Sheriff Larry Leitha said of the dead, 59 are adults and 36 are children. Fourteen adults and 13 children remain unidentified, he said. » Five campers and one counselor , an all-girls Christian summer camp that draws attendees from North Texas, remain missing as of Wednesday, according to the sheriff. On Wednesday, Gov.Greg Abbott also announced . The first four focus on flood warning systems, flood emergency communications, relief funding for Hill Country floods as well as natural disaster preparation and recovery. “There is more work to be done, particularly in the aftermath of the devastating floods in the Texas Hill Country,” he said in a news release. “We must ensure better preparation for such events in the future.” In addition, the governor Texas flags across the state to be lowered to half-staff in honor of the victims and families who suffered an “unimaginable loss,” after previously declaring for Sunday. Flags are expected to be returned to full-staff at sunrise on Monday, July 14, 2025. Across the state, at least 119 people have died as of Wednesday. In addition to the 95 found dead in Kerr County, at least eight died in Kendall County, seven in Travis County, five in Burnett County, three in Williamson County and one in Tom Greene County. Over 2,000 people have participated in search efforts, Leitha said, though officials said Tuesday that no live rescues have taken place since Friday. Abbott said officials have been seeking more information about those who were in the state’s Hill Country during the Fourth of July holiday but did not register at a camp or a hotel and may have been in the area without sharing their whereabouts with others. Crews in airboats, helicopters and on horseback along with are part of one of the largest search operations in Texas history. “We have to find every single person who’s missing,” Abbott said in a Tuesday news release, “and that’s job No. 1.” were still missing in Kerr County alone as of Tuesday, according to Abbott. Many more could be unaccounted for, as out-of-towners visited the region for their Fourth of July holiday weekend. The governor urged anyone who believes a loved one could be missing due to the flood to call 830-258-1111 or report it online at kerrvillemissing@dps.texas.gov. But with no survivors found since Friday, the total death toll across the Hill Country and Central Texas is likely to rise much higher than the 109 fatalities that Abbott announced Tuesday." If I don't hear from you, I fear the worst.

Please, don't let that happen.

I was reviewing our State GOP Membership Rolls and heart sank when I saw your 2025 State Republican Membership Card has lapsed. remember the day you joined us, the passion and energy you brought to our team. We shared a commitment to Conservative values and a vision for a better future. But now, it feels like that's all slipping away... Life gets busy, and sometimes things fall through the cracks. But the thought of not having your voice, your support, and your commitment to our cause is a hard reality to face. That's why I'm reaching out to you today, one last time. It's not just about the money; it's about standing with us against the Radical Left and fighting for what's right. If I don't hear from you, I fear the worst. I fear that we'll lose another vital voice in our fight for Conservative values... Please, don't let that happen. name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: They tried to own this generation. We are taking it back.
body:
We’re in a moment of national reflection.

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zibr69ac19kk3db62ur6p4ngmu4jejeuqe2l248o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chgm8or2c9h2bs)
---
Friend, If you’ve ever wondered whether we can actually win this fight for America’s soul... Let me send you the proof. I want to ship you a FREE hardcover copy of my book, **_Right Wing Revolution._**
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhov60rhc197l8c003vpl2m8n965vt3k4qfsjcb8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chgm8or2c9h2bs)
---
No strings attached, just make a donation of ANY amount to Turning Point USA today so that we can reach even more young people and fuel our unstoppable movement.
---
[ **Yes, Charlie! Send Me My FREE Book!**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjo275fo886be6dnq24fvffil76lkvneb0s1hbig_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chgm8or2c9h2bs)
---
This isn’t just a book. **It’s what the Left never wanted you to read.** Why? Because it lays out — in brutal detail — how they hijacked our culture... And how we can flip it BACK, one campus, one student, one bold conversation at a time. **There’s no better time than NOW for you to join us... Because we’re seeing it** **in “Red” states and “Blue” states:** 🔥 Students standing tall for this country
🔥 Overflowing crowds shouting that they’re “PROUD to be an American!”🔥 Hands in the air to get their own “47” and “MAGA” hats
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvtgb0nj2rcn9ctpbbu738ssld6iq6hvsoscsv78_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chgm8or2c9h2bs)
---
We’ve sparked a wildfire. And it’s only growing..._Right Wing Revolution_ tells the story behind the movement. How we keep the momentum going. How we DEFEAT the Left once and for all. Friend, this isn’t about merely watching history... It’s about making it._**[Make your gift of any amount today to join our movement, and I’ll send your free copy today!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zj49177a8o1ke6is3dg57c6fmr5e91k4db69so68_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chgm8or2c9h2bs)**_
---
[ **Make My Gift & Claim My FREE Book**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrgpovcrl15j20dgpdadnr9u28dvlm3dd7k15vm8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chgm8or2c9h2bs)
---
Let’s win this fight. Let’s make history. Let’s never let the Left have its grip on our nation’s youth again! The next generation is choosing America — and with your help, we will make sure they never look back. For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA

subject: I have good news and bad news

body:
Democrats just launched a massive attack

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvod141r6vj2jqo7d8rk7favekjhqg5gk2qthttg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chgm8or1c1h2bs)Dear Friend, it's Newt Gingrich.
I've got good news and bad news for you.
Bad News: State Republicans failed to meet our End-of-Quarter goal before the deadline. With the help of George Soros, the Hollywood Elite, Big Tech Billionaires, and their cronies in the Swamp, the Radical Left has dumped $$$ MILLIONS $$$ into spreading their dishonest, socialist agenda nationwide to take control of legislatures in key battleground states.
Good News: State Republican leaders are willing to EXTEND our End-of-Quarter deadline to 11:59 PM TONIGHT. We still have time to fight back![RUSH SUPPORT BEFORE MIDNIGHT
](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr2q2pr53d0m1ehoek3tkji25fjul50aj6gn4ta8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chgm8or1c1h2bs)But let me be very clear: this is not a drill. Democrats are playing for keeps, and if we don't match their efforts dollar-for-dollar, we risk letting all the work State Republicans have done to defend our Conservative Majorities be for nothing.
That's why I'm counting on you to make an emergency contribution to our End-of-Quarter push. Democrats are playing for keeps, and if we don't match their efforts dollar-for-dollar, we risk letting all the work State Republicans have done to defend our Conservative Majorities be for nothing. That's why I'm counting on you to make an emergency contribution to our End-of-Quarter push. We can't afford to fall behind - not now, not ever. We have just hours to make up lost ground and show Democrats that we mean business. I have faith our team can do it, but don't let them get the upper hand. Make your voice heard and your contribution count in this critical hour. name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Act now to save 13 million acres of Arctic wilderness from Trump
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Don't let Trump administration destroy 13 million acres of Arctic wilderness](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8008e38c-f186-4739-ad82-ec51ffbef66c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T385bd152-f6d8-4702-8516-c3027c5c4c51/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | The Trump administration is moving to undo critical protections for 13 million acres of pristine wilderness in Alaska's Western Arctic. This reckless plan would devastate caribou herds already at 40-year population lows, further endanger polar bears, and displace millions of migratory birds. [**Fight back. Don't let this happen.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9a29622a-fb4f-4e15-86fb-9a55aea3f8d0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Industrial oil drilling would obliterate this vast wilderness, one of America's last intact ecosystems, and further exacerbate the climate crisis. The administration is accepting public comments on its plan until August 4. We need your voice now to help show massive public support for a wild, unscarred Arctic. [**We cannot let these crucial protections go without a fight. Click here, and add your name and comment to help defend this land.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5883f52f-b210-44a9-ada8-09fb0906f46d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:
Should Trump double the number of illegal immigrant arrests?

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTIwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDcxMF9NSS1JSC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2NjcwMzktMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA3MTBfTUktSUguMTEwMTE3X3QxNjY3MDM5LTI4OTkifQ/R51pbC_m6RFyTWQMKNFfWQ)Peter,
As President Trump continues the fight to secure our borders and protect American communities, your voice is more important than ever.
Now, Border Czar Tom Homan is calling for bold action. He’s calling for**I _CE to remove at least 7,000 illegal immigrants per day_** – more than double the current daily arrests.
With the passage of the **One Big Beautiful Bill** , ICE just received a massive funding boost for deportations, and Homan says it’s time to put that money to work.[Now we want to hear from you:](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTIwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDcxMF9NSS1JSC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2NjcwMzktMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA3MTBfTUktSUguMTEwMTE3X3QxNjY3MDM5LTI4OTkifQ/itCdkl_46A7fkloYTdoeYw)[Do you back Border Czar Tom Homan’s goal of 7,000 daily arrests?

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdef3c1da-6f63-41c4-bf4f-9deccf257353/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: The Flyover
subject: Nvidia Hits $4T, Flag Football, and a Radioactive Ring
body:
Nvidia briefly became the [world’s first public company to top a $4 trillion valuation](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFutDAQhJ8GOk62sVlcuPib6-5vU6I1Xh-bGIyMxenePiJ5hJSj0czom4_H9EBOvD3_40quxjxt9DoS1Upl2k4OjAvXQ9eY8Blzrh5TwkkJZToBnRRTQE7vSbfBRSJFfUtOglFSS6tluzgBPWE0ejZGShiMARh7smCHgaz3umV3tQmQQgphenvD4CNpMRpPFO0YGi0ocM3l9pl5qwvF9M4nlduc1za5pdb9aPp_jbo36o77BXBZlyiV50SNuv-idLqrhVPivHXzwvuKX1Q6sBpoHBCILFqrvY1ymPtZAFgPOrbFhf11xY4BGi2eK3L6Ga9_eux06jsAAP__00F90w) Wednesday, driven by soaring demand for its AI chips.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkT_v0zAQQD-NsyXyv9jtkAH9okz8WAAhJsu1z8mBHUfJtVW_PSp0gpHx3vDu6e7bu3v3mHGdP_kCA6XqVrgfGYhgd-sNI_oF6dCUsp9TrXTxOXsnuexbblvBXfSYH043cUgAElQDg7C9FFqctWiWgSdrjRHgT95qZbw4B99Hk0xQ1hgbGhyeNm4FF5z36tz5eEmg-am_AKTzKTLNISLVvftRcaUFUn7UG-xdqKXJw0K0HUx9YHJicprxBl3Yr13dZyanP-p2q3fY282Hn0e3UMlMTW--bB7n9a1GYGr8Mtnp43cmzZWKO-p1D096h8sLFYh4LUyNr-UvHF6Wvw2hrgQrMTVu9SCHa3i4r59dqtkxaUqNPjM1PmPbGRMxaSJTo7RK6hNn0oTn9E97sw9xu2POeBjLNJ-Lx_z7DPRfv7sN8lcAAAD__yaqrBk) | |
# Thursday, July 10, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1850,****[ Vice President Millard Fillmore](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAQRb8Gd1iA8WIXFNu4y7ZbWiQM8URjiGA2lv9-5af3B68-R1dX5-9tvQUkzM8_YQfPqawZjkbADHXNH4wYNuRmOVF4plL4HojCapQZpXJSqzUGpHO1XfQJwMDQgdduNNrq2epu807NLlillXoMelAmTQ7c7Nw4jWGcrenQX2vK6csZh7kP8Z7Aqmm8A6R5isIqiMil9q-CmTdIdJYP1P5R9o78xvxuYvgtzCLMchxHv2HjUs-LC7Pwhk3GcErM8psIs7z-0Sm1EmbZkSjUKBMS7aWCbEep-bJDk-8KDSNk7qqP7wOJsP1ywqrnHpC-HvCPsn28-R8AAP__FOOCSA) became the second man to inherit the presidency after President Zachary Taylor died from a severe intestinal illness contracted on the Fourth of July. In today's edition, we unbox a forgotten piece of Cold War childhood: a 1947 cereal-box prize that let kids literally [play with radioactivity](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQAL8GOke2MSEULq6hy7VXosVew94tdmQ25PL3T3m_8OqRRqP5c5_vQEx5_Q07ekllzvg6GEWwzvmkSLCRHE4Sw5pKkQWYYbba9koPyug5AvF7dm30CdFi16I3Q2-NM6Mz7eb1LXaLW9yYQrqa2AG4a-8QYkq2T2FsyX9sejDaaN134wXiktDpW78gpvEWG6cxkpR6-Vsoy4aJ3-XEegllb9lvIo-j6X41dmrstJfjgBxTWT-4sdM_-q8CVgRWR-GoICsI8gRWFSIVCEInqvwMjFBVpbwqKSpsxLFiVpSVGd3Q2KmtPj5exEzHdWicXncg_m6QH407vf0KAAD__yu0hFk). It makes us wonder: What are the things we take for granted today that might horrify future generations? Reply to this email to let us know. [Cru Inner City](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkT_v0zAQQD-NsyXyv9jtkAH9okz8WAAhJsu1z8mBHUfJtVW_PSp0gpHx3vDu6e7bu3v3mHGdP_kCA6XqVrgfGYhgd-sNI_oF6dCUsp9TrXTxOXsnuexbblvBXfSYH043cUgAElQDg7C9FFqctWiWgSdrjRHgT95qZbw4B99Hk0xQ1hgbGhyeNm4FF5z36tz5eEmg-am_AKTzKTLNISLVvftRcaUFUn7UG-xdqKXJw0K0HUx9YHJicprxBl3Yr13dZyanP-p2q3fY282Hn0e3UMlMTW--bB7n9a1GYGr8Mtnp43cmzZWKO-p1D096h8sLFYh4LUyNr-UvHF6Wvw2hrgQrMTVu9SCHa3i4r59dqtkxaUqNPjM1PmPbGRMxaSJTo7RK6hNn0oTn9E97sw9xu2POeBjLNJ-Lx_z7DPRfv7sN8lcAAAD__yaqrBk) is today's sponsor, and with your help, they're giving students backpacks full of school supplies.
|
---
## Nvidia First to Hit $4 Trillion Valuation
Nvidia briefly became the [world's first public company to top a $4 trillion valuation](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFutDAQhJ8GOk62sVlcuPib6-5vU6I1Xh-bGIyMxenePiJ5hJSj0czom4_H9EBOvD3_40quxjxt9DoS1Upl2k4OjAvXQ9eY8Blzrh5TwkkJZToBnRRTQE7vSbfBRSJFfUtOglFSS6tluzgBPWE0ejZGShiMARh7smCHgaz3umV3tQmQQgphenvD4CNpMRpPFO0YGi0ocM3l9pl5qwvF9M4nlduc1za5pdb9aPp_jbo36o77BXBZlyiV50SNuv-idLqrhVPivHXzwvuKX1Q6sBpoHBCILFqrvY1ymPtZAFgPOrbFhf11xY4BGi2eK3L6Ga9_eux06jsAAP__00F90w) Wednesday, driven by soaring demand for its AI chips. Though the stock closed slightly below the mark, the Santa Clara firm is now [more valuable than Apple and Microsoft](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1upzAUxE8DnZFtzFfhYhu6_za7Ukr0sJ_BycNGxgFx-4jkCOlGM9JofvP2ml7gyYflL2yos4tTwOsgzBnTFE5vPaw-Hyo7gsXFmGcggkly2TDeMcEnC57uSZVWO0SJdYladI0USgxKlKuuG4muRYfQqx5baQbRiZbPnXOmH1pTev208U5wwXlTDxXY2aHifTMjuqG3heJofY6peo8-5BUd3fHEVJm4laTXnPejqP8UcizkCLN5CKolPnEhx_9o1hApLnchx8sn_JdjerRZ_b7BByb2w8lOoE-YCZmJ2w7hZldMZJliOXkiHwMTsm4FF6Ipk7b79bhH2xWKLxt4-t6Tf3XiqeVXAAAA___Gc4fA), reflecting Wall Street's deep confidence in the AI boom. Analysts expect Nvidia's stock to keep climbing, with earnings set to hit another record in August, when it's scheduled to release its next quarterly earnings report.
## Biden’s Doctor Pleads the Fifth in House Probe

## List: Best Major Airports in US
Tampa International Airport ranked first in a list of the [top 10 U.S. airports](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFurDAQheGngQ5kG7PGhYvbbLe3TYnGeLxMYjDCk7X27SPyCumPPun8H4_5AZRof_6HDR3HPO9YS0JmPOf9RYFgJS6aY4JnzJk9pASzEmrshOmkmANQes-6DS4iKhxadNKMSmpptWxXt4xGem3i4odFWzmg0Tf0Qk4BbLCTbsldmjBSSCHGwfYQfEQtptEjRjuFRgsMxPnsPzPtvGJM7_zCs1_y1ia3Mh-lGf416t6oe621vy5UxK9r0Ki7x8Id0Hnkk0v3XboNjgNDp4SVwzS2pwtHpZSo3EyjxXMDSr82_ynIy6mfAAAA__-aj3TQ) for traveler experience, followed by Phoenix Sky Harbor and Minneapolis-Saint Paul at second and third. The study analyzed 31 of the busiest U.S. airports using a traveler-focused index, including Google ratings, amenities, and lost luggage per 100,000 passengers. Tampa earned the highest overall score of 71 out of 100 and received the most five-star reviews. Phoenix ranked second with a score of 63.9 thanks to a strong performance in luggage handling, while Minneapolis-Saint Paul placed third with a score of 62.4 and the second-best Google ratings. The latest ranking reflects a resurgence in global air travel, with experts reporting an 8% increase in passenger demand for April 2025 compared to the previous year. In today's edition, we unbox a forgotten piece of Cold War childhood: a 1947 cereal-box prize that let kids literally . It makes us wonder: What are the things we take for granted today that might horrify future generations? Reply to this email to let us know. is today's sponsor, and with your help, they're giving students backpacks full of school supplies. | Nvidia First to Hit $4 Trillion Valuation Nvidia briefly became the Wednesday, driven by soaring demand for its AI chips. Though the stock closed slightly below the mark, the Santa Clara firm is now , reflecting Wall Street's deep confidence in the AI boom. Analysts expect Nvidia's stock to keep climbing, with earnings set to hit another record in August, when it's scheduled to release its next quarterly earnings report. Biden’s Doctor Pleads the Fifth in House Probe Dr. Kevin O’Connor, Joe - House Oversight questions Wednesday about whether he misled the public on the former president’s mental fitness or health, invoking his Fifth Amendment rights. Republicans called it a smoking gun in their probe of a possible cover-up surrounding Biden’s decline, while as standard legal protection. O’Connor was reportedly asked point-blank if he was ever told to lie about Biden’s health—and declined to answer. List: Best Major Airports in US Tampa International Airport ranked first in a list of the for traveler experience, followed by Phoenix Sky Harbor and Minneapolis-Saint Paul at second and third. The study analyzed 31 of the busiest U.S. airports using a traveler-focused index, including Google ratings, amenities, and lost luggage per 100,000 passengers. Tampa earned the highest overall score of 71 out of 100 and received the most five-star reviews. Phoenix ranked second with a score of 63.9 thanks to a strong performance in luggage handling, while Minneapolis-Saint Paul placed third with a score of 62.4 and the second-best Google ratings. The latest ranking reflects a resurgence in global air travel, with experts reporting an 8% increase in passenger demand for April 2025 compared to the previous year. . body:

Friend, I’m proud to share with you that **_President Donald J. Trump has officially endorsed my re-election_** to the U.S. Senate in 2026! [**If you can, will you stand with President Trump and me to keep Kansas****RED****in 2026? Become one of our campaign’s first donors here >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/cf9cd409613c115c3947229f28c3afba/b8e6e5cc42c70e57c3d6b838967d376c/37973)

**Since you sent me to the Senate five years ago, I’ve led the fight to put Kansas, and America, FIRST.** I’ve stood up for our farmers and ranchers against insane overregulation. I’ve fought to expose the truth about who unleashed COVID on our country, and was attacked and even called a “moron” by Tony Fauci for my trouble. **And I’ve backed President Trump’s agenda 100% of the time,** standing with our president to cut taxes, secure our border, lower costs for working families, and above all put AMERICA FIRST. **[You’ve stood with me, and I am so grateful for that. Now, I need you to stand with me again as this campaign gets underway. ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/cf9cd409613c115c3947229f28c3afba/c54c0dcae282cadec3d6b838967d376c/37973)**

Last go round, the Democrats spent **_$30 MILLION_** trying to defeat me. There’s no reason to think they won’t spend even more this time. **So we have to get a headstart now.** There’s no better chance to show our momentum and send a forceful message than now, immediately after President Trump’s endorsement. **[I’m humbly asking you to stand with President Trump, stand with me, and let’s keep Kansas RED, and keep Making America Great Again, together.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/cf9cd409613c115c3947229f28c3afba/90d0e40075dfb0f5c3d6b838967d376c/37973)** Thank you, and God bless. Greg Abbott said 161 people are missing in Kerr County alone.

# Thursday, July 10, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1900, the state of Texas granted a charter to the Rosenberg Library Association of Galveston. The [Rosenberg Library](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DuOrDAQheHVmAxUVTxMBw5uQtY3ndCyoQBLbtyyqx_sfjQj9QomOsGRvuD_utqrCzEc2393YyPvNdmDXyWyCGdLAPBM8XEIcy7vmVPmErajWALqa9A1gl1ciKftqsV4WC5YsUHdE3Y9jUO1G-xGbleNs-t7j6BhGGkgfRk0A46AVTA_GGgEREBqG9_O48jataw1r61XHfASJOVGdhZ-u7LGMz05N3O6VdHsIvei2n-KJkVTToUPz3mrY_DZ5bNJeVM0OZ8e8tladv78iqYqm-X-CjGGMmjVwXZzIf7q8rcmT0PfAQAA__-k7XSU), opened in 1904, succeeded the Galveston Mercantile Library, which was founded in 1871 as the state’s first public library. Today, we're highlighting how corporations and public figures [are supporting](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSgyAURb8GO53HQwMWFNvYZdstHYRnZAbBATbGv99JfmH7O_fec37u89344OPj2-yk62tNc6SzBKqV8owA8EzhN1aiXF6WUqbiH7HMCDi0IFsOszM-XHPfOL2AG3lDmssBeT-gujWbRnTCKCnEIEdSYy_MsJBx7jbSImCAxut3GUgOnANH0S3CKkXSCJKSVrGwHsj5mnJXN6r0MmUNV3pS7mzam6C3Wo_CxBfDieF0nme3X8VEE2uKPr1DDKc3FcMpJGsCw8nk6m0ghpOlQEv29WozGVt9iqX9jLRrSMmVFkEOSqm-O7ajydodpw_Bl5tkPTx248PnRv2fvKfGvwAAAP__i6qD2w) flood victims. Have you or anyone you know been personally impacted by the disaster? Let us know in the _Poll_. We're sponsored today by [Glabrous](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGP3CAUhH8N7mzBwxhfQXHSylKKS5pISYcwPGwU1pwAr9f_PlqnSn3d996MRqP59aE_TIhhW76bO6r69ElveJSItWLWQCl9pLhvFTGXp8WUsYRlKxooiJbKllHtTIin7hunZureWIOKSQGsFzAOzaoEWjO-oUUzGykEtUyOworZU5BOUNcE9QqjklHGKAPezdyOI0rDUUr0fCY9RRdqyl1dseLTFB_P9MDc2XRvolpr_SyEvxOYCEzHcXQL1iWaOae9lD9he_kITKsJ-WyjcWdp0bcrED5p9LpmsxVja0ibDo7wG4EhXTAyAsN-4TD2_7-N99cBnBMYyj4zwm8_f08_CAzv07fbP6nJyn0eIcZQBkl6utxNiFfv-rW1Hwr-BgAA__8cDY8S), the game-changing grooming device.

## 2,000 Volunteers Searching for Flood Victims
Officials have confirmed at least [119 deaths in six counties](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2O6yAUBOCnwR3WAZsQFxS3cZfbbmlhONjsEogA_739KnmFrUfzaTRfj-mhffBx-a-fqOrp0hTxKAFrxTxxANhT2GJFzOU0mDIWv8QyceCCgqQMJqt9uKa-sWoGO7AGFZOCs17w-61Z1SDMIBgDizcH6DoBvbTcCcFEx90wN169MZAMGAPGu3buzP2OUncoJbpuJj2g9TXltq5Y8dTFhSvtmFuTnk1Qa62vQrp_hI-Ej8dxtD-nju-Q8NFgrFkH-ukRPga_I51DWqgLKVma0bypi27RYj70RXWhBXU2KxZqUqw-bki_t3DRgfCxycq-Dh-CLzdJelie2ofPkPq3-3bFfwMAAP__2QiFgg) from the devastating flash floods on July 4. Helicopters, horses, airboats, cadaver dogs, and excavators have been employed to aid in the challenging task. President Trump plans to visit the disaster area on Friday.
## Families of Public Figures Among Flood Victims, Survivors
Some well-known public figures have been impacted by the flooding in Central Texas this past weekend. [Janie Hunt](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL3SoyAARZ9GOzL8qGhBsU26bLulg3BRZhEcICa-_TfJK3z1nbnnzPn3mB_aBx_Xv3qHqm-X5ohXCagVeeaU0jOFZ6xALm-DlFH8GsvMKe8JlYTR2WofrrlrrVqonVgLxWTPWdfzcWg3JdwiwLppdBOE486aXg6amkGIBU5MrVefMyoZZYwyLm6LMOMIqQWkhBNL01FYX1O-1Q0Vb11cuNKJfDNpb4Paaj1KI_40_N7w-4F0BHymht__61h0IcbXi5jNwxWSXhGZ7OmZYyEWum7kSs-4koygqz9BvgjiQkq2EMbkIPkg2qzs8fIh-DLIpqPrrn34CtTfZTsV_wkAAP__YqGC1g), 9, was a relative of Kansas City Chiefs owner Clark Hunt. Their grandfather is David Lawrence, the former publisher of the _Miami Herald_. ## Growing Support for Central Texas
Corporations, public figures, and celebrities have joined in the effort to support those affected by the flash floods in Central Texas, offering financial contributions and words of encouragement. Home Depot, Lowe’s, Walmart, Procter & Gamble, Airbnb, and Apple have all [provided financial or material donations](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDHSpCAQhU-jGRYgin9AsInZbLqhhdJobyFY0KPO7becK2z-fd3vvT-v6WUxYFx_2x0M3T5NEa4SgAjyJDnnZwrvSAC53AukDAXXWCbJZce4ZoJPzmL4TKp2ZubuR9RghO6kUJ0c-nozftCt0kp1P5b7XkrvlQcuxGyh751vazTPMa4FF4IL2TZzuwwDaNuC1uDbuVIcHFLKDW1AcNviwyedkJsl7XUwG9FRqvZXJcdKjtd1NT7dst_Su1CKD1TJ8WlVyXG3f1NmS9oPGxEKO3I60QFzWGwhyCxDQPDMwWkLWQLHvh8fZX9HpEey_iEdWBc-zIeUHMa1zsYdF4aApdeV4utuMXwT0v_tehr5LwAA__-zbJC0). clean_body: Officials have confirmed at least from the devastating flash floods on July 4. Following an of the damage on Tuesday, Gov. Greg Abbott said 161 people are missing in Kerr County alone. | | | | | | Thursday, July 10, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1900, the state of Texas granted a charter to the Rosenberg Library Association of Galveston. The , opened in 1904, succeeded the Galveston Mercantile Library, which was founded in 1871 as the state’s first public library. Today, we're highlighting how corporations and public figures flood victims. Have you or anyone you know been personally impacted by the disaster? Let us know in the Poll. We're sponsored today by , the game-changing grooming device. Abilene ☀️ 96/75° | Amarillo ⛅ 98/71° | Austin 🌤️ 95/74° | Brownsville 🌥️ 91/77° | Corpus Christi 🌤️ 92/76° | DFW ☀️ 96/75° | El Paso 🌦️ 102/74° | Houston ⛅ 93/77° | Laredo ⛅ 98/74° | Lubbock ☀️ 96/72° | Midland ☀️ 94/72° | San Antonio 🌤️ 95/74° | Tyler 🌧️ 94/73° | Waco ☀️ 94/74° Don’t feel like reading the national edition of The Flyover? Tune in to The Flyover Podcast! New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | 2,000 Volunteers Searching for Flood Victims Officials have confirmed at least from the devastating flash floods on July 4. Following an of the damage on Tuesday, Gov. Greg Abbott said 161 people are missing in Kerr County alone. Abbott when asked who was to blame for the disaster, saying, "That's the word choice of losers." Lawmakers are expected to discuss in Kerr County and other areas of the state susceptible to flooding in the upcoming special session. In the nation’s capital, Sen. John Cornyn for flood victims on the Senate floor. Gov. Abbott has ordered flags to be until Monday. More than 2,000 volunteers have for victims. Helicopters, horses, airboats, cadaver dogs, and excavators have been employed to aid in the challenging task. President Trump plans to visit the disaster area on Friday. Families of Public Figures Among Flood Victims, Survivors Some well-known public figures have been impacted by the flooding in Central Texas this past weekend. , 9, was a relative of Kansas City Chiefs owner Clark Hunt. She passed away during the flooding at Camp Mystic, along with , 8-year-old twins from Dallas. Their grandfather is David Lawrence, the former publisher of the Miami Herald. Country singer shared that his younger brother John, along with his wife Julia and two of their children, are among the missing. He delayed a concert scheduled for Sunday night, saying his family is “ grieving alongside countless Texans whose lives have been upended by this tragedy.” Meanwhile, the grandchildren of (R-GA) were safely evacuated from Camp Mystic, as were the daughters of (R-San Angelo). "They were holding hands. They were praying ," Pfluger said. Growing Support for Central Texas Corporations, public figures, and celebrities have joined in the effort to support those affected by the flash floods in Central Texas, offering financial contributions and words of encouragement. Home Depot, Lowe’s, Walmart, Procter & Gamble, Airbnb, and Apple have all . H-E-B is delivering food to the disaster area and has to support those affected by the floods. Fort Worth country music singer raised $330,000 for flood victims during a Monday night livestream. name: Justin Riemer - RITE President
subject: RITE 2025 Midyear Update
body:
Litigation victories and looking ahead. |
---
| |
---
| | **RITE 2025 Midyear Update** As we enter the second half of 2025, I’m writing to update you on RITE and RITE PAC’s ongoing activities, including some recent litigation victories, and offer our assessment of election integrity in the United States today.

To begin, I recently succeeded Derek Lyons as President of RITE, RITE PAC, and the Ulysses S. Grant Institute for the Study of Democracy, a charitable organization in RITE’s network. Derek did a fantastic job leading these organizations for nearly three years and remains involved. We are lucky to have his keen legal mind and strategic acumen available to support our efforts. As you may know, I’ve been deeply involved with RITE from its inception and am grateful for the privilege to carry on our important work. I look forward to continued engagement with you as we work to protect America’s elections for generations to come.

It has been a busy and successful year thus far. RITE and RITE PAC are litigating in courtrooms around the country with 13 active lawsuits, engaging in numerous others through amicus briefs, and have already amassed an impressive string of wins, including:
* **Arizona:** RITE PAC secured a [unanimous victory](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=bd201fd318&e=ea91f782ea) on appeal to end efforts by the state’s activist Secretary of State to unilaterally rewrite Arizona’s election rules. As the court held, the Secretary violated the state Administrative Procedures Act when he tried to overwrite state statutes and weaken key safeguards like protections against noncitizen voting. The next step will be to preserve this victory in the state’s Supreme Court later this year.
* **Maryland:** RITE notched a [significant win](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=5384ff130f&e=ea91f782ea) in an unfriendly federal court that ensures public access to critical tools for holding election officials accountable to their obligation to keep voter rolls accurate and current. RITE invalidated state regulations that stopped citizens from investigating Maryland’s diligence in removing nonresidents, the deceased, and duplicate registrations. The state did not even bother to appeal. Through this victory, RITE broke new ground, securing a ruling that the federal National Voter Registration Act requires public disclosure of voter rolls for oversight of list maintenance efforts.
* **Georgia:** RITE PAC [beat back](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=c9d6fbff22&e=ea91f782ea) a Marc Elias-led challenge to the state’s absentee ballot application deadline, ensuring that officials have ample time to review and process applications. Elias was testing a new legal theory here that he would no doubt deploy around the country had this gambit been successful.

You may have also heard about the **North Carolina** Supreme Court race that went undecided for six months because of litigation involving multiple illegalities within the state’s elections. At issue was a problem RITE identified before the election. In September, [we sued](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=b989745181&e=ea91f782ea) to invalidate a surreal statute that permits people who have never resided in North Carolina, or even the United States, to vote in the state. This statute violates the state constitution, which correctly requires voters to be state residents.

RITE’s lawsuit remained unresolved by Election Day, but the candidate who trailed by just a few hundred votes adopted RITE’s legal theory in his election contest litigation. Although he ultimately lost the race, the state’s Supreme Court fully endorsed RITE’s argument. We’re now working to secure final victory in our lawsuit and to expand it to other states with similar unconstitutional laws on the books, just like we did last week in [**Arizona**](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=056beb651e&e=ea91f782ea).

RITE’s North Carolina case underscores a troubling trend: the left’s quest to undermine the principle that voters must vote where they reside. The left wants to “float the vote,” redistributing voters from blue to more competitive areas. They have devised several ways to do this, and unfortunately, some courts have played along. RITE is fighting to stop this.

RITE is also working to ensure states verify the identity and eligibility of new registrants. This is critical, as weak verification processes infect the entire electoral system and create opportunities for fraud and other irregularities.

To that end, RITE has sued [**Pennsylvania**](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=f527889233&e=ea91f782ea) to require officials to verify driver’s license or social security numbers on voter registration applications before accepting them. This process ensures officials don’t add duplicate registrations and ineligible voters to the voter rolls, including noncitizens. RITE PAC is also in court defending a [**Florida**](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=39eb9fa02c&e=ea91f782ea)** l**aw Marc Elias challenged that requires officials do these checks. RITE will pursue additional litigation on these issues in other states as the year progresses.

RITE and RITE PAC are active in other cases nationwide. We are filing briefs to defend President Trump’s Executive Order on election integrity and supporting pro-election integrity ballot initiatives that bypass legislative resistance to improving elections. For example, RITE is at work in [**Maine**](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=7d72d3f54f&e=ea91f782ea) helping to stop a rogue Secretary of State from grossly distorting a proposed voter ID ballot initiative in an effort to mislead voters.

We must resist complacency in the wake of our advancements. We have gained much ground since 2020, made possible in no small part by RITE’s participation in 60 cases in 23 states. But polls show that election integrity remains a huge concern for Americans, confirming that more work is needed to restore trust in our elections. Against the hundreds of millions the left devotes to distorting and undermining election safeguards, there are only a handful of conservative groups that engage in the type of high-quality litigation that can achieve enduring victories. And RITE is the only one dedicated to doing nothing but that.

We are deeply grateful for your support. The country is a better place because of it. We are always here to answer any election integrity questions you may have.

Sincerely,

Justin Riemer
President, RITE and RITE PAC ###

clean_body: Litigation victories and looking ahead. | | | | | RITE 2025 Midyear Update As we enter the second half of 2025, I’m writing to update you on RITE and RITE PAC’s ongoing activities, including some recent litigation victories, and offer our assessment of election integrity in the United States today. To begin, I recently succeeded Derek Lyons as President of RITE, RITE PAC, and the Ulysses S. Grant Institute for the Study of Democracy, a charitable organization in RITE’s network. Derek did a fantastic job leading these organizations for nearly three years and remains involved. We are lucky to have his keen legal mind and strategic acumen available to support our efforts. As you may know, I’ve been deeply involved with RITE from its inception and am grateful for the privilege to carry on our important work. I look forward to continued engagement with you as we work to protect America’s elections for generations to come. It has been a busy and successful year thus far. RITE and RITE PAC are litigating in courtrooms around the country with 13 active lawsuits, engaging in numerous others through amicus briefs, and have already amassed an impressive string of wins, including: Arizona: RITE PAC secured a on appeal to end efforts by the state’s activist Secretary of State to unilaterally rewrite Arizona’s election rules. As the court held, the Secretary violated the state Administrative Procedures Act when he tried to overwrite state statutes and weaken key safeguards like protections against noncitizen voting. The next step will be to preserve this victory in the state’s Supreme Court later this year. Maryland: RITE notched a in an unfriendly federal court that ensures public access to critical tools for holding election officials accountable to their obligation to keep voter rolls accurate and current. RITE invalidated state regulations that stopped citizens from investigating Maryland’s diligence in removing nonresidents, the deceased, and duplicate registrations. The state did not even bother to appeal. Through this victory, RITE broke new ground, securing a ruling that the federal National Voter Registration Act requires public disclosure of voter rolls for oversight of list maintenance efforts. Georgia: RITE PAC a Marc Elias-led challenge to the state’s absentee ballot application deadline, ensuring that officials have ample time to review and process applications. Elias was testing a new legal theory here that he would no doubt deploy around the country had this gambit been successful. You may have also heard about the North Carolina Supreme Court race that went undecided for six months because of litigation involving multiple illegalities within the state’s elections. At issue was a problem RITE identified before the election. name: James O'Keefe
subject: I’ve Risked Everything for the Truth– Will You Stand with Me?
body:
There have been nights when I’ve questioned if it’s worth it. The legal bills, the threats, the constant pressure—it takes a toll. I’ve sacrificed relationships, financial security, and my own safety. But then I think of the lives we’ve touched. Like the voters who saw our exposés on election and Voter ID fraud, leading to new laws in multiple states.

| [****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs9uf378vpaqpejor9bf80mtk6fd23d67b6k5at8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhmcoj6c5h2bs)
[****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvbd4m37poovlkhapikj5adbumghokpp5dt3bip8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhmcoj6c5h2bs) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, and I'm writing to you not just as a journalist, but as someone who's poured his heart, soul, and life into a mission that's bigger than me.

For over 15 years, I've fought to expose the truth--about corruption, fraud, and the powerful who think they can hide in the shadows. It's been a journey of sacrifice, risk, and relentless determination, and I'm asking you to [**join me in this fight by supporting**O 'Keefe Media Group****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkl30o2585ghcoh2i44iqinmbl9i52idc4qiepjo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhmcoj6c5h2bs).

Picture me in 2009, a kid from Westwood, New Jersey, with nothing but a cheap camera and a fire in my belly.

I grew up in a family that taught me to work hard and stand for what's right, but I had no money, no connections, just a belief that the American people deserved to know what was happening behind closed doors.

I maxed out credit cards to buy plane tickets and equipment, [**racking up $50,000 in debt for one investigation alone --exposing NPR's bias in 2011**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5c0rfdr7hka24d2vd43gq640blr0r062mnrpqi0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhmcoj6c5h2bs).

I'd lie awake at night, wondering how I'd pay it off, but I kept going because I knew the truth was worth it.

A few years before that in 2009, I got my big break. I went undercover at ACORN, a group funded by your tax dollars. Posing as a pimp and with an undercover journalist posing as a prostitute, we caught employees on hidden camera offering advice on dodging taxes and running illegal operations. The videos hit like a thunderbolt--**Congress cut ACORN 's funding, and the organization collapsed**.

It was proof that one person could change the game. But it also painted a target on my back. The powerful don't like being exposed**, and they 've been coming for me ever since**.

**[**Will you help me keep exposing the truth?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7nt1n37kpss8lun6rho3lroefe03elva933es9g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhmcoj6c5h2bs)**

I need to raise **$28,400 as soon as possible** to fund our July operations, cover travel for our next sting, and pay our team. [**Your gift of $25, $50, or $100 will keep our cameras rolling and our mission alive. Donate now.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6of0d6uktd4tg8tsoctvtksv8brv9koj52pdco0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhmcoj6c5h2bs)

In 2010, I faced one of my darkest moments.

I was arrested for entering Senator Mary Landrieu's office, investigating claims she was ignoring constituents during the healthcare debate. Despite showing my ID went I entered the building, I was still charged for entering a federal building under false pretenses.

The government slapped me with felony charges, and I spent a night in a jail cell, [**staring at the walls, wondering if my dream was over.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z52lu8ftunlgnc4d9nat5qt98at2vbsa4k8i6jfg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhmcoj6c5h2bs)

I was 25, facing years in prison, and the media painted me as a villain. But I thought of the people counting on me--the Americans who deserved to know the truth--and I refused to give up.

I pleaded guilty to a misdemeanor, got three years of probation, 100 hours of community service, and a $1,500 fine. **Even on probation, I didn 't stop**. I built a team of citizen journalists and kept digging, exposing voter fraud and media bias while under the government's thumb.

That resilience paid off. In 2011, we released videos that forced NPR's CEO and executives to resign, revealing their bias to the world.

In 2014, I crossed the Rio Grande dressed as Osama bin Laden to expose border security failures, sparking a U.S. Senate investigation. My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, called me "one of the great journalists," and **Rush Limbaugh said our NPR sting was a "grand slam."**

But every victory came with a cost--more lawsuits, more threats, more attempts to silence me.

**[**Your support can keep this fight alive**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7t27a2ichqp7q4klf1jrhv62n4k9hbpb5fd254g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhmcoj6c5h2bs)****.** We're the only ones exposing the bureaucrats undermining our Republic, and we need **$28,400 by in days** to continue. [**A donation of $50 or $200 will fund our next investigation and protect our work from activist lawsuits**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcdbfrg8dibg4gm1aeqrf5en7h337k017mlbfkq0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhmcoj6c5h2bs).

The hardest blow came in 2021.

**I woke up to the FBI pounding on my door in Mamaroneck, New York, raiding my home over a diary allegedly belonging to President Biden 's daughter. **

They took my phones, my computers, everything--trying to scare me into submission.

I stood in my apartment, watching them tear through my life, and felt the weight of their power.

But I also felt a fire inside me.

If they were coming this hard, it meant I was hitting a nerve.

I refused to back down, speaking out on Fox News with Sean Hannity, declaring, "This is an attack on the First Amendment." That moment strengthened my resolve to keep fighting, no matter the odds.

The lawsuits have been relentless.

From ACORN employees to activist attorneys, I've faced legal battles that would break most people. Even my own organization, Project Veritas, sued me in 2023, alleging financial mismanagement after I founded O'Keefe Media Group.

They tried to bury me, but I kept going, **because the truth is bigger than any one fight.**

**[**I need you now more than ever**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrgchik5eh4955mdmika0037tigp2dqk1jo86lsg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhmcoj6c5h2bs)****.** Summer donations are down, and [**we must raise**$28,400 within days** to keep exposing corruption. **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2did1ecgsoirgn1dsrq0v6buhjv0ih7dujjimko_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhmcoj6c5h2bs)

[**Your gift of $25 or $75 will help us train citizen journalists and fight back against those trying to silence us. Donate today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z49ivph7dtm99v710s01e3t60ktdlmhbnng7e0a0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhmcoj6c5h2bs)

There have been nights when I've questioned if it's worth it.

The legal bills, the threats, the constant pressure--it takes a toll.

I've sacrificed relationships, financial security, and my own safety.

But then I think of the lives we've touched. Like the voters who saw our exposes on election and Voter ID fraud, leading to new laws in multiple states.

Or the families who benefited when we exposed Medicaid incompetence, forcing retraining. Every time I feel like giving up, I remember why I started: **because the American people deserve a government that serves them, not one that hides behind lies.**

With **O 'Keefe Media Group**, I'm building a legacy.

We're not just reporting news--we're training an army of citizen journalists to carry the torch. Our recent work has exposed media cover-ups, government waste, and corporate greed, sparking firings and policy reviews. But we're not done.

The bureaucrats undermining President Trump's agenda, wasting your tax dollars, and pushing their own agendas are still out there. **We 're the only ones holding them accountable with hidden cameras and fearless journalism.**

**[**Will you stand with me?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn7tota505c8e8lb2m97mk6gksclb1inp0foaft8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhmcoj6c5h2bs)**

[**We need**$28,400 within days** to keep going. **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr84rk18sdkar4t6qpgoq2bldk8opi5s57thfit0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhmcoj6c5h2bs)

[**Your donation of $50, $100, or $500 is a direct blow against corruption, ensuring the truth reaches millions.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zadh2i9c12dcrgoammdv7pufjebae1o1l72qdq98_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhmcoj6c5h2bs)

I'm not an activist. I'm a journalist, driven by an obsession to uncover what the powerful want hidden.

The mainstream media won't do it--they're too busy protecting the elites.

But I've never backed down, and I never will. I've risked everything for this mission, and I'm asking you to join me.

Your support isn't just a donation--[**it 's a lifeline**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpum3gh6mfhj8fdtps3voetif0b87f0c084bb83g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhmcoj6c5h2bs).

It's a statement that you believe in truth, transparency, **and the fight for our Republic**.

Please, if my story moves you, if you believe in what we're doing, [**donate today**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3tlf1bsk0tqp4c05vlaeopgk8rb6kv91ce6sc6o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhmcoj6c5h2bs). [**We 're down to the wire, and every dollar counts. **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z49beuotiqkhram86rp2d9cfo3g065gll230m2ko_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhmcoj6c5h2bs)

Together, we can keep **exposing the truth and holding the powerful accountable**.

Thanks for standing with me,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---
[****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2kdjt3hq6m4p3p7q7ee1jmr8eek5m6uqna3l3m8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhmcoj6c5h2bs)
---

Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential

name: Johnny Garrett
subject: Matthew 28:18 really hits home for me
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Johnny Garrett For Congress
body:
Here’s why:

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zk26n0ad3fn8h5kr9bob0b1bv0e04kqhi5rf5pug_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhm2p36cdh2bs) "Then Jesus came to them and said, 'All authority in heaven and on earth has been given to me.'" The meaning of Matthew 28:18 has always resonated with me, Friend.
How come?
Because no matter what happens in this world, I ultimately answer to one authority: God.
It's Johnny Garrett here, the pro-Trump conservative candidate for Congress in Tennessee's must-win 6th Congressional District.
I was born and raised in the heart of Tennessee, where the values of family and faith were instilled in me from a young age.
20 years ago, the idea of running for Congress wouldn't have even crossed my mind. I would have laughed if someone had suggested it.
But this is God's plan.
In a swamp where special interests and mega corporations call the shots, I'm committed to answering to Him, and Him only.
If you send me to Washington, I'll NEVER forget that.
I'm just an everyday guy who goes to church on Sundays and volunteers with Little League baseball. [Now, I'm asking you to take this leap of faith with me by chipping in a few dollars to support my campaign.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z3id8mgj3sanknad6d6f8bcfc2i72kskvmcp8p20_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhm2p36cdh2bs) | [TAKE A LEAP OF FAITH >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z242dlm0ro7g0dtovv79adurrhuarvao9vabkqlg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhm2p36cdh2bs)
