clean_body: Here’s why: "Then Jesus came to them and said, 'All authority in heaven and on earth has been given to me.'" The meaning of Matthew 28:18 has always resonated with me, Friend. How come? Because no matter what happens in this world, I ultimately answer to one authority: God. It's Johnny Garrett here, the pro-Trump conservative candidate for Congress in Tennessee's must-win 6th Congressional District. I was born and raised in the heart of Tennessee, where the values of family and faith were instilled in me from a young age. 20 years ago, the idea of running for Congress wouldn't have even crossed my mind. I would have laughed if someone had suggested it. But this is God's plan. In a swamp where special interests and mega corporations call the shots, I'm committed to answering to Him, and Him only. If you send me to Washington, I'll NEVER forget that. I'm just an everyday guy who goes to church on Sundays and volunteers with Little League baseball. | Thank you for your time, Johnny Garrett | | | | Paid For By Johnny Garrett For Congress PO Box 165, Goodlettsville, TN 37070 Pop Acta Media | National Republican Polling PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: James O'Keefe
subject: I’ve Risked Everything for the Truth– Will You Stand with Me?
body:
There have been nights when I’ve questioned if it’s worth it. The legal bills, the threats, the constant pressure—it takes a toll. I’ve sacrificed relationships, financial security, and my own safety. But then I think of the lives we’ve touched. Like the voters who saw our exposés on election and Voter ID fraud, leading to new laws in multiple states.

| [****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcm9glann6nmh2n1lou2trhcpv4ls7utitidsb50_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhm2p36cth2bs)
[****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znpj49no2trfj26faf6l5osjlblopl7psh6ctnkg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhm2p36cth2bs) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, and I'm writing to you not just as a journalist, but as someone who's poured his heart, soul, and life into a mission that's bigger than me.

For over 15 years, I've fought to expose the truth--about corruption, fraud, and the powerful who think they can hide in the shadows. It's been a journey of sacrifice, risk, and relentless determination, and I'm asking you to [**join me in this fight by supporting**O 'Keefe Media Group****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfjb19bn9q6og86e36nbhgj2835crkbpaiqi5vc8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhm2p36cth2bs).

Picture me in 2009, a kid from Westwood, New Jersey, with nothing but a cheap camera and a fire in my belly.

I grew up in a family that taught me to work hard and stand for what's right, but I had no money, no connections, just a belief that the American people deserved to know what was happening behind closed doors.

I maxed out credit cards to buy plane tickets and equipment, [**racking up $50,000 in debt for one investigation alone --exposing NPR's bias in 2011**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4k08g3sgcpecvr9ucqq42u4gfs1n5bp90ii5898_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhm2p36cth2bs).

I'd lie awake at night, wondering how I'd pay it off, but I kept going because I knew the truth was worth it.

A few years before that in 2009, I got my big break. I went undercover at ACORN, a group funded by your tax dollars. Posing as a pimp and with an undercover journalist posing as a prostitute, we caught employees on hidden camera offering advice on dodging taxes and running illegal operations. The videos hit like a thunderbolt--**Congress cut ACORN 's funding, and the organization collapsed**.

It was proof that one person could change the game. But it also painted a target on my back. The powerful don't like being exposed**, and they 've been coming for me ever since**.

**[**Will you help me keep exposing the truth?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zplve5i9695pdq0kpls62nk70iimo3srtf4md4g0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhm2p36cth2bs)**

I need to raise **$28,400 as soon as possible** to fund our July operations, cover travel for our next sting, and pay our team. [**Your gift of $25, $50, or $100 will keep our cameras rolling and our mission alive. Donate now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zajh9bgbrbc438a0qbs96ra2p53bnidmpqef4ch8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhm2p36cth2bs)

In 2010, I faced one of my darkest moments.

I was arrested for entering Senator Mary Landrieu's office, investigating claims she was ignoring constituents during the healthcare debate. Despite showing my ID went I entered the building, I was still charged for entering a federal building under false pretenses.

The government slapped me with felony charges, and I spent a night in a jail cell, [**staring at the walls, wondering if my dream was over.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9nd06bhs6bhft8eqjoe600rmls9jg3sga3u99e0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhm2p36cth2bs)

I was 25, facing years in prison, and the media painted me as a villain. But I thought of the people counting on me--the Americans who deserved to know the truth--and I refused to give up.

I pleaded guilty to a misdemeanor, got three years of probation, 100 hours of community service, and a $1,500 fine. **Even on probation, I didn 't stop**. I built a team of citizen journalists and kept digging, exposing voter fraud and media bias while under the government's thumb.

That resilience paid off. In 2011, we released videos that forced NPR's CEO and executives to resign, revealing their bias to the world.

In 2014, I crossed the Rio Grande dressed as Osama bin Laden to expose border security failures, sparking a U.S. Senate investigation. My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, called me "one of the great journalists," and **Rush Limbaugh said our NPR sting was a "grand slam."**

But every victory came with a cost--more lawsuits, more threats, more attempts to silence me.

**[**Your support can keep this fight alive**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5n6mtqjiqjcjrjm98le9agrm5oka5nvf5kgaplo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhm2p36cth2bs)****.** We're the only ones exposing the bureaucrats undermining our Republic, and we need **$28,400 by in days** to continue. [**A donation of $50 or $200 will fund our next investigation and protect our work from activist lawsuits**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoujch1din2cbsupupp852ebmu9i879lnn8vpm40_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhm2p36cth2bs).

The hardest blow came in 2021.

**I woke up to the FBI pounding on my door in Mamaroneck, New York, raiding my home over a diary allegedly belonging to President Biden 's daughter. **

They took my phones, my computers, everything--trying to scare me into submission.

I stood in my apartment, watching them tear through my life, and felt the weight of their power.

But I also felt a fire inside me.

If they were coming this hard, it meant I was hitting a nerve.

I refused to back down, speaking out on Fox News with Sean Hannity, declaring, "This is an attack on the First Amendment." That moment strengthened my resolve to keep fighting, no matter the odds.

The lawsuits have been relentless.

From ACORN employees to activist attorneys, I've faced legal battles that would break most people. Even my own organization, Project Veritas, sued me in 2023, alleging financial mismanagement after I founded O'Keefe Media Group.

They tried to bury me, but I kept going, **because the truth is bigger than any one fight.**

**[**I need you now more than ever**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztdoe62mi8e1t84637ctcitbtpdbm3eq4v22dfjo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhm2p36cth2bs)****.** Summer donations are down, and [**we must raise**$28,400 within days** to keep exposing corruption. **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5qej0clotg0oubsau9e0omr3rokuh83gc14ro28_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhm2p36cth2bs)

[**Your gift of $25 or $75 will help us train citizen journalists and fight back against those trying to silence us. Donate today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi7ej13p3g1cbng2n5tc307mn8vs14jbqs0sgu88_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhm2p36cth2bs)

There have been nights when I've questioned if it's worth it.

The legal bills, the threats, the constant pressure--it takes a toll.

I've sacrificed relationships, financial security, and my own safety.

But then I think of the lives we've touched. Like the voters who saw our exposes on election and Voter ID fraud, leading to new laws in multiple states.

Or the families who benefited when we exposed Medicaid incompetence, forcing retraining. Every time I feel like giving up, I remember why I started: **because the American people deserve a government that serves them, not one that hides behind lies.**

With **O 'Keefe Media Group**, I'm building a legacy.

We're not just reporting news--we're training an army of citizen journalists to carry the torch. Our recent work has exposed media cover-ups, government waste, and corporate greed, sparking firings and policy reviews. But we're not done.

The bureaucrats undermining President Trump's agenda, wasting your tax dollars, and pushing their own agendas are still out there. **We 're the only ones holding them accountable with hidden cameras and fearless journalism.**

**[**Will you stand with me?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp9tkmp5ru05bkdsqb89akkit8u5su69m2lkt590_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhm2p36cth2bs)**

[**We need**$28,400 within days** to keep going. **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpfs4j5k3s0a5lpo2986889oqqjqnjktqlss3148_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhm2p36cth2bs)

[**Your donation of $50, $100, or $500 is a direct blow against corruption, ensuring the truth reaches millions.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhsb7vedv45of19qsq2dl30a33cko00ff9g9cg80_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhm2p36cth2bs)

I'm not an activist. I'm a journalist, driven by an obsession to uncover what the powerful want hidden.

The mainstream media won't do it--they're too busy protecting the elites.

But I've never backed down, and I never will. I've risked everything for this mission, and I'm asking you to join me.

Your support isn't just a donation--[**it 's a lifeline**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcsj3eofg45idnijthi9lld3rp8jtoqsadftm2l0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhm2p36cth2bs).

It's a statement that you believe in truth, transparency, **and the fight for our Republic**.

Please, if my story moves you, if you believe in what we're doing, [**donate today**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlbdn02sr72ar7pihtrmgsjdvdi1r92f7d2pgvh8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhm2p36cth2bs). [**We 're down to the wire, and every dollar counts. **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt1n293v38vrudkat02i1uaooi6v6gflqrci3u6o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhm2p36cth2bs)

Together, we can keep **exposing the truth and holding the powerful accountable**.

Thanks for standing with me,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---
[****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zal96tamavtmi6e5cev8va1plccnivlhimfhts20_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhm2p36cth2bs)
---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News

# [These "Troll Polls" Are Bullsh*t. Don't Let the GOP Mess With Our Heads. ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=167987147&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3OTg3MTQ3LCJpYXQiOjE3NTIxNTMyODUsImV4cCI6MTc1NDc0NTI4NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0._yRlSrMUXYSFW5pRdUWts-2kZo8xVrVmXXSo_aoTEdc)
### DC Republicans know they're losing, so they're flooding the zone with distorted data to mess with Democratic voters and campaigns.
| | [Mike Nellis](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---
| Jul 10
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=167987147&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3OTg3MTQ3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1MjE1MzI4NSwiZXhwIjoxNzU0NzQ1Mjg1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDI1ODExNSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.wOh580Z0Ecsidc2u3QpZFb7hoe7lE1rp_LVqNKQzYJ0&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/endlessurgency/p/these-troll-polls-are-bullsht-dont?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

The National Republican Senate Committee (NRSC)--the group responsible for electing a Republican Senate--is running a master class in trolling Democratic campaigns right now. And too many people are falling for it.
Over the past several days, the NRSC has been rolling out what I'd call troll polls--manipulated, distorted numbers dressed up as legitimate data, designed to push false narratives. Why? Because they know that poll aggregators, influencers, reporters--and even campaigns--will latch onto any poll to feed the endless demand for content, bait high-dollar donors, or spin up press hits. The result? Manufactured momentum, confused Democratic donors, and distractions for the campaigns they're targeting.
Make no mistake: these troll polls aren't signs of Republican strength--they're signs of desperation. With Trump's approval ratings tanking and the GOP's deeply unpopular "Big BS Budget" dragging them down, Republicans know the Senate is in play, and they're scared.
Take Michigan, for example. The NRSC just dropped a poll showing Haley Stevens and Abdul El-Sayed far ahead of Mallory McMorrow--conveniently just days after Mallory reported outraising the field with a massive grassroots fundraising haul from small-dollar donors. Even more telling: this poll came right on the heels of a high-quality independent poll memo from _Yes Michigan_ showing Mallory as the strongest general election candidate.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9c90ae41-74d5-49a0-b83c-6da765986f04?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_I 'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..6ddWJWdsO7fClBP6GfbpBk6e2IWj9gxezhw6SWkIGuk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=167987147)
To me, this is simple: Republicans are scared to run against her. And it makes sense. Mallory is an effective communicator, a strong fundraiser, and when voters get to know her, the data shows they like her. (Full disclosure: I do digital work for her.)
Mallory is exactly the kind of next-generation political communicator who can bring new voters into the tent, center real issues, and build the kind of winning coalition Democrats need for the general election. That's why I'm proud to be part of her team.
Now take Texas, where the NRSC dropped another troll poll claiming Jasmine Crockett is the frontrunner for the Democratic Senate nomination. Now, I love Jasmine Crockett--she's a phenomenal communicator and an incredible person--but I haven't heard anything about her actually considering a Senate run. The names people actually expect in the mix are James Talarico, Colin Allred (already in), Joaquin Castro, and a few others.
The Republicans' game here is obvious: distract from Colin Allred's campaign launch, sow division among Democrats, and hand influencers and reporters a shiny object to chase. And people are taking the bait. Abdul El-Sayed's campaign jumped on the poll for digital fundraising (and honestly, I don't blame them), and others picked it up for engagement bait, too.
The point is: Republicans are playing us. They're exploiting the political world's insatiable hunger for new polls and fresh narratives--knowing full well that no one will remember who actually ran the poll in the first place.
Democrats need to wise up. We have to stop letting Republican operatives shape our narratives, divide our coalitions, and dictate how we talk about our own candidates. Democratic primary voters--not Republican pollsters--should decide who our nominees are. And we have incredible candidates who deserve to be judged on their ideas, their campaigns, and their ability to win--not on garbage data designed to mess with our heads--and more importantly, mess with voters.
It's a dirty trick, but it's a smart one. And Republicans are going to keep doing it. Not just in Senate races, but in House races, presidential primaries--anywhere they can sow chaos. The point isn't accuracy. The point is to mislead.
The bottom line: Don't feed the trolls. Don't fall for fake narratives. Don't amplify them. And don't let Republican operatives play you. Democratic voters--not bad-faith Republican trolls--should decide who represents our party. And don't lose sight of what actually moves voters: organizing, storytelling, and building real momentum.

subject: Democrats are trying to pull a fast one
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
don’t let them catch us off guard

Friend, Democrats are trying to pull a fast one in Nebraska.

Dan Osborn, a fake "Independent" just announced he's running for Senate against NRSC Vice Chair Pete Ricketts.

This guy calls himself an independent, but he's fully backed by Chuck Schumer and the Democrat machine. If he's in the Senate, he'll do everything he can to cripple President Trump's agenda.

**[Will you help Pete fight back and win ASAP?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zo1l9b4hha9aehkvf26u1rh6se5eq0174v7j5vn8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhm6o72clh2bs)**
[DONATE NOW >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2za99ep88adfho95ni7mh6tepi544r5i6fcmpu9ng_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhm6o72clh2bs)
**[Democrats tried to run this playbook last year, and they got really close.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z5h455irh6jckgd6a667tu6f6c3cj8fj3mvsk078_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhm6o72clh2bs)** _It was the closest Senate race in Nebraska in more than 50 years._

They almost caught us asleep at the wheel then. They're hoping they'll catch us napping now.

**[We can't let it happen. >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zfe0qpmjvjc21rddb0p191mp1bkdsom32brubam8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhm6o72clh2bs)**

If you care about keeping President Trump's majority, this is your chance to slam the door on a Democrat scheme to end it.

Thanks in advance,

-NRSC HQ

Peter — It's official. Trump's so-called "Big, Beautiful Bill" is now law, and the consequences are _devastating._
The nonpartisan Congressional Budget Office confirms what we feared: **11.8 million Americans will lose Medicaid coverage** while billionaires receive massive tax breaks.
Roughly **1 in 5 Americans** rely on Medicaid. This bill puts their care, their hospitals, and their lives at risk. No one should lose access to health care just to pay for billionaire tax cuts.
**We need to know where you stand:**
**Do you support Donald Trump’s Medicaid cuts?**
**[YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111202671/556548097/836965518?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY1YWQ1YmVkLThmNWQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LFiNnt6CQY9hBFGhXKlOUTuzqw17vZSNlC1XfG-dyRc=&emci=21dc338f-ee5c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=65ad5bed-8f5d-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ceid=16951753)** | **[NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111202673/556548098/836965518?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY1YWQ1YmVkLThmNWQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LFiNnt6CQY9hBFGhXKlOUTuzqw17vZSNlC1XfG-dyRc=&emci=21dc338f-ee5c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=65ad5bed-8f5d-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ceid=16951753)**

Thank you.

name: Johnny Garrett
subject: Matthew 28:18 really hits home for me
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Johnny Garrett For Congress
body:
Here’s why:

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zol1nact0vmqke0511304vchjqu4osi0dblhg8mg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhmepr6cth2bs) "Then Jesus came to them and said, 'All authority in heaven and on earth has been given to me.'" The meaning of Matthew 28:18 has always resonated with me, Friend.
How come?
Because no matter what happens in this world, I ultimately answer to one authority: God.
It's Johnny Garrett here, the pro-Trump conservative candidate for Congress in Tennessee's must-win 6th Congressional District.
I was born and raised in the heart of Tennessee, where the values of family and faith were instilled in me from a young age.
20 years ago, the idea of running for Congress wouldn't have even crossed my mind. I would have laughed if someone had suggested it.
But this is God's plan.
In a swamp where special interests and mega corporations call the shots, I'm committed to answering to Him, and Him only.
If you send me to Washington, I'll NEVER forget that.
I'm just an everyday guy who goes to church on Sundays and volunteers with Little League baseball. [Now, I'm asking you to take this leap of faith with me by chipping in a few dollars to support my campaign.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zktvikr3lbk0e5uve77cmcevri30gifo0vkib778_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhmepr6cth2bs) | [TAKE A LEAP OF FAITH >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcohqi5o0g1cbqgqasha3k8n5lvrmat4rd8es7ro_rp22sh2s8i6epb2chhmepr6cth2bs)

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: 30,000 VA Staff — Gone
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Donald Trump and Tom Collins are STILL in charge of the largest reduction in force the Department of Veterans Affairs has ever seen.
#

Peter —
Less than two months into his presidency, Trump and Tom Collins got rid of close to 20,000 VA staff. They made no secret about their plans, too: Another 80,000 were on the chopping block.
I fought them on that relentlessly, and held up all of Collins’ political appointees for months over it. If he can’t do his job without a half dozen people, how is he supposed to do it with another 80,000 less staff?
Yesterday, they blinked. The 80,000 number is gone, and it’s down to 30,000 VA staff total. That’s better, but it is absolutely not good enough. Here’s why:
**Donald Trump and Tom Collins are STILL in charge of the largest reduction in force the Department of Veterans Affairs has ever seen.** These are doctors and counselors and researchers who spend 100% of their time serving veterans, and Trump can’t get them out the door fast enough. Veterans trusted this guy and he is stabbing them in the back.
Trump got his parade. He got his budget. He got the funding he wanted for mass deportations without due process, his trillions in tax cuts, write offs for private jets, the whole thing.
He got all that and stiffed the people who fought for this country. Veterans who depend on food assistance, mortgage support, Medicaid have all been told to take a hike. There’s nobody to help disabled vets move from one side of a VA facility to another. Nobody’s answering the phones when a vet calls their VA to see an oncologist. For God’s sake, cancer labs are starting to crowdfund to keep their research going. Even the Veterans Crisis Line isn’t safe!
I went through a lot in Iraq, but I never forget how fortunate I am to be where I am right now. A lot of my friends never made it home, and a lot more took their own lives after they came back. There are millions of veterans worried about what’s happening to the VA right now. They don’t know what they’re going to do, and they need our help.
I’m going to use whatever tools I have at my disposal to stand up to Trump, and I need you with me.
[**Please: Join me and demand that Trump keep his promises to veterans and stop his attacks on the VA. We owe veterans a whole lot better than this.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/sign_on_VA_petition_em_july25_/?source=em250710-1-160&refcode2=3914.734936.SxV3H0&akid=3914%2E734936%2ESxV3H0)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/sign_on_VA_petition_em_july25_/?source=em250710-1-160&refcode2=3914.734936.SxV3H0&akid=3914%2E734936%2ESxV3H0)
Semper Fi,
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

I went through a lot in Iraq, but I never forget how fortunate I am to be where I am right now. A lot of my friends never made it home, and a lot more took their own lives after they came back. There are millions of veterans worried about what’s happening to the VA right now. They don’t know what they’re going to do, and they need our help. I’m going to use whatever tools I have at my disposal to stand up to Trump, and I need you with me. Semper Fi, Ruben Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Hi Peter,

Last week, President Trump officially signed his “Big Beautiful Bill” into law. Here is the group photo from the signing...
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111209270/556562998/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250710BBB_N_JZ_90DO_9_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMzNWZlYjFjLTk0NWQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=O4wihYMpN_5rsjxBG6fmv5WGZGZWyLar-TIRAmp3NMM=)

**We thought we were angry before we saw this picture...**

The senseless Medicaid cuts — $930 billion slashed — could force as many as 144 rural hospitals across the US to close their labor and delivery units. This will have catastrophic consequences for mothers and infants. Where will these women go to deliver their babies?

According to _Mother Jones_ , “The cutbacks and closures won’t just affect patients; they will also have a profoundly destructive impact on rural jobs and economies, where hospitals typically serve as one of the biggest employers in their communities. According to the National Partnership analysis, **more than 80 percent of people working in hospitals in non-metro areas are women.”**

[**This is a direct attack on America’s women and children. We are sick and tired of men making decisions about women, our bodies, and our well-being. We desperately need more women in the rooms where these decisions are being made. Rush $20.25 and support our efforts to ELECT pro-choice, pro-WOMEN women candidates – especially in states with abortion bans.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111209271/556563005/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250710BBB_N_JZ_90DO_9_G_N_L1&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMzNWZlYjFjLTk0NWQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=O4wihYMpN_5rsjxBG6fmv5WGZGZWyLar-TIRAmp3NMM=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$20.25 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111209272/556563011/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250710BBB_N_JZ_90DO_9_G_N_EB20.25&express_lane=true&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMzNWZlYjFjLTk0NWQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=O4wihYMpN_5rsjxBG6fmv5WGZGZWyLar-TIRAmp3NMM=)

---
In addition to those attacks, the cuts to Medicaid will also affect Planned Parenthood – in what Planned Parenthood’s team is calling an “**attempt to end abortion in the United States.** ”

**Without revenue from patients on Medicaid, Planned Parenthood facilities across the country will have to close.** According to PP, almost 200 clinics across 24 states will be at risk, with over 90% of those closures in states where abortion is **_legal._**

**That’s not all:** This news comes just a week after the Supreme Court decision in _Medina v. Planned Parenthood South Atlantic_ , which ruled that states are allowed to **block** Medicaid funding for Planned Parenthood and individuals are unable to sue over being denied coverage from PP or similar providers. **These recent developments could destroy women’s healthcare as we know it and put other freedoms at risk.**

[**Women’s rights in this country have been under constant threat. Women legislators are our best defense against these attacks from male politicians. Help us elect more of them to office in 2025 and 2026 by pitching in $20.25 or more today →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-pac/?refcode=EM_F_250710BBB_N_JZ_90DO_9_G_N_L2&amount=20.25)

The work continues,

Jordan Zaslow
Founder & Executive Director of Her Bold Move

name: PoliticsPA
subject: Big shift for PA Dems
body:
Tune into the latest installment of the Voices of Reason podcast. | | | |
---
| | | Welcome to the latest edition of _Voices of Reason_ where we’ll recap exclusive news and data featured in our most recent podcast.

This new segment dives into conversation on the future of Democratic politics in PA. Exploring the ripple effects of the NYC mayoral race, nuisances between Pittsburgh and Philly, and the importance of funding state services.

Political analyst **Jon Delano** unpacks who’s running for what and why it matters with insights and views you won’t want to miss.
---
| **Big Names Make News**
---
| **Political analyst Jon Delano** cautions against “reading New York as an indicator” noting that while traditional democrat candidates lost in both mayoral primaries, “the politics of Pittsburgh are quite different” than NYC. [[Watch](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d327ff6768&e=b7b3eddce2)]

**Political analyst Jon Delano** explains how “public transit is essential and yet at the same time has become very expensive” with challenges such as the PRT (Pittsburgh Regional Transit) authorities closing down routes and raising transit fares due to lack of funding. [[Watch](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=738eafb5c5&e=b7b3eddce2)]
---
|
* * *
---
| **Numbers You Need to Know**
---
| _Elections_
* Challenger Corey O’Connor (**52.8%**) unseated Pittsburgh Mayor Ed Gainey (**47.2%**) in the Democratic primary on May 20, 2025. [[SpotlightPA](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5d3d22369d&e=b7b3eddce2)]
* Other successful primary races in PA came from R-Tony Moreno (**70%**), R-Matt Wolford (**62%**), R-Maria Battista (**54%**), and D-Larry Krasner (**64.5%**). [[NYTimes](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=23ea91e8ce&e=b7b3eddce2)]
* In the NYC mayoral Race, Zohran Mamdani (**56.2%**) defeated traditional Democrat Andrew Cuomo (**43.8%**) in the third round of ranked-choice voting. [[NYTimes](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=fe4d8cea0b&e=b7b3eddce2)]

_Voter Interests_
* Governor Shapiro has “pledged" major support for public transit, proposing a **$292 million** funding increase in his February budget and redirecting **$153 million** in federal highway funds to help SEPTA avoid steep fare hikes. [[MassTransit](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=fdd72ddeaf&e=b7b3eddce2)]
* Transit agencies tend to get around **$1.5 billion** in state tax revenue every year, which is allocated to items like paying for driver salaries and gas for buses. [[SpotlightPA](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b6d35a7871&e=b7b3eddce2)]
* According to several released policy briefs by the Allegheny Institute, the PRT’s bus expenses ranked **sixth highest** in the nation among 50 US transit agencies. [[AlleghenyInstitute](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=efe2e0e17a&e=b7b3eddce2)]

---
|
* * *
---
| **What NYC Shake-Up Means for Pittsburgh Area Dems**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1bce80fdb9&e=b7b3eddce2 "What NYC Shake-Up Means for Pittsburgh Area Dems | Voices of Reason feat. Jon Delano")
---
|
* * *
---
| **In Case You Missed It...**
---
| The _Voices of Reason_ podcast has covered the most important issues in Pennsylvania politics – from [education funding](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=eedaa64476&e=b7b3eddce2) to [trust in elections](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=bc56176ac8&e=b7b3eddce2). Secretary of the Commonwealth [Al Schmidt](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=268e069442&e=b7b3eddce2), PA Treasurer [Stacy Garrity](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=398c8a8048&e=b7b3eddce2), and House Appropriations Chairman [Jordan Harris](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=dba3429c8b&e=b7b3eddce2) are just a few of many influential guests who have joined us for exclusive interviews and roundtable discussions.
Visit the _Voice of Reason_ [YouTube page](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9544ae3c90&e=b7b3eddce2) to experience all the great moments you missed.
---
|
* * *
---
| **Get in Touch**
---
| We like smart ideas and want to hear from you.

Send feedback and inquire about appearing on _Voices of Reason_ , at [press@politicspa.com](mailto:press@politicspa.com?subject=Voices%20of%20Reason%20Podcast%20Inquiry).
---
|
---
| | | | | | [](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f64e737810&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
[](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8869fbd57b&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
[](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e19ac3ace8&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---

You're getting _Voices of Reason_ updates due to your interest in the PoliticsPA & Broad + Liberty websites, plus stories with impact in Pennsylvania, the Greater Philadelphia area, and beyond.

**Our mailing address is:**
Broad + Liberty323 West Front StreetSuite 200Media, PA 19063
[Add us to your address book](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7902855e75)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/profile?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7902855e75&e=b7b3eddce2&c=dd71a5b000) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7902855e75&t=b&e=b7b3eddce2&c=dd71a5b000).

name: Stop Trump via Our Revolution
subject: Trump's sinister plan to use our data against us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Trump is deploying the military into our communities, ignoring the courts,
and declaring war on the working class. And now he’s tasked one of his
billionaire donors, Peter Thiel, with creating the federal government’s
first citizenship data bank to surveil and spy on us all.

Robert Reich is sounding the alarm, warning ALL of us to wake up and stop
Trump and Thiel from politicizing our data to use it against us:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32798?source=email-20250710&t=1011&akid=8990%2E5885482%2EGPQvq- ]Peter Thiel's Palantir poses a greave threat to Americans

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32798?source=email-20250710&t=1012&akid=8990%2E5885482%2EGPQvq- ]Here’s how: even some Republican members of Congress are raising the
alarm, giving us a key opportunity to generate enough public pressure to
force them to act. Will you send a message straight to Congress demanding
it immediately halt federal funding for Palantir and put people’s privacy
above corporate profits?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32798?source=email-20250710&t=1013&akid=8990%2E5885482%2EGPQvq- ]ADD YOUR NAME

Right-wing billionaire Peter Thiel’s Palantir Technologies has an alarming
track record of invasive surveillance and sweeping privacy violations. His
AI-based platform already allows military and law enforcement agencies to
analyze our personal data and information, social media posts, and even
physical characteristics.

Thiel poured millions into Trump's campaigns and is now cashing in with
massive new government contracts that treat Americans' private lives as a
product to be harvested for profit. First, it was a new deal with ICE to
track and round up immigrant families. And now Trump has ordered ALL
government agencies to share our data with Palantir.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32798?source=email-20250710&t=1014&akid=8990%2E5885482%2EGPQvq- ]Headline: How Palantir, the secretive tech company, is rising in the
Trump era

This cozy relationship should TERRIFY every American concerned about
Trump’s authoritarianism.

But the good news is we still have the power to stop it. Our Revolution
members are mobilizing nationwide to call on Congress to cut off
Palantir’s government funding – exposing the extreme corruption of the
Oligarchs in the media, mobilizing our Citizen Action team to pressure
Congress, and bird-dogging lawmakers to put them on the spot face to face.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32798?source=email-20250710&t=1015&akid=8990%2E5885482%2EGPQvq- ]The last thing Trump needs is MORE power to surveil and spy on ANYONE
he likes. Will you urgently send a message to Congress to stop bankrolling
Trump and Thiel’s dangerous surveillance schemes?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32798?source=email-20250710&t=1016&akid=8990%2E5885482%2EGPQvq- ]ADD YOUR NAME

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: EMILYs List
subject: This is happening behind our backs.
body:
The president's MAGA allies are quietly making abortion inaccessible — even in blue states. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111213348/556571643/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE716_20250709_IndivisibleInspo_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1056565&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzUzNDlhMC05NjVkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JhCkPvFsfx2ePMuxfBxIOfDVL9JPf0BoWLBJxLLiAZo=) Peter,

Donald Trump's Supreme Court already overturned _Roe v. Wade_. Now, he's laying the groundwork for a second wave of abortion bans — and he's doing it quietly.

Since returning to office, Trump and his MAGA allies have launched _hundreds_ of covert attacks on reproductive freedom. Their strategy is simple: Use backdoor tactics to make abortion inaccessible in every state, even where it's still legal.

Here's just a glimpse of what they've done in a matter of months:
* Withdrew support for life-saving abortion care in hospitals
* Launched a sham "report" on abortion pills to undermine public trust and justify future bans
* Tried to weaponize a 152-year-old law to ban abortion pills by mail
* Pushed laws to undo state constitutional abortion protections
* Enacted legislation to shut down clinics and defund Planned Parenthood
* Paved the way for anti-abortion extremists to act without consequence

These aren't hypothetical threats — they're real policies, already in motion. And unless we fight back now, the damage could be irreversible.

EMILYs List is laser-focused on electing Democratic pro-choice women who will stand up to these attacks in Congress, in statehouses, and in governors' mansions across the country. clean_body: The president's MAGA allies are quietly making abortion inaccessible — even in blue states. | = Peter, Donald Trump's Supreme Court already overturned Roe v. Wade. Now, he's laying the groundwork for a second wave of abortion bans — and he's doing it quietly. Since returning to office, Trump and his MAGA allies have launched hundreds of covert attacks on reproductive freedom. Their strategy is simple: Use backdoor tactics to make abortion inaccessible in every state, even where it's still legal. Here's just a glimpse of what they've done in a matter of months: Withdrew support for life-saving abortion care in hospitals Launched a sham "report" on abortion pills to undermine public trust and justify future bans Tried to weaponize a 152-year-old law to ban abortion pills by mail Pushed laws to undo state constitutional abortion protections Enacted legislation to shut down clinics and defund Planned Parenthood Paved the way for anti-abortion extremists to act without consequence These aren't hypothetical threats — they're real policies, already in motion. And unless we fight back now, the damage could be irreversible. EMILYs List is laser-focused on electing Democratic pro-choice women who will stand up to these attacks in Congress, in statehouses, and in governors' mansions across the country. But we can't do it without you. **=** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Trump and his allies want people to think abortion is a "state issue" now. But make no mistake: They are coming for abortion in every state. body:
The fight to block the socialist take over begins now
| | | | |
---
| Friend,
Tomorrow is our first major fundraising deadline of 2025--and we're staring down a full-blown socialist takeover.
Albany Democrats aren't even pretending to think for themselves anymore. They're stampeding to line up behind Zohran Mamdani--a self-proclaimed socialist who's now their party's standard bearer.
The same Mamdani who brags about wanting to "seize the means of production" and declared his intention to arrest the Prime Minister of Israel if he visits New York under his mayorship.
And the same Mamdani who doesn't just want to destroy New York City--he and his communist friends want this radical agenda statewide.
If we don't hit our fundraising goal by midnight tomorrow, we'll fall further behind in the fight to stop them.

clean_body: The fight to block the socialist take over begins now | | | | | | Friend, Tomorrow is our first major fundraising deadline of 2025--and we're staring down a full-blown socialist takeover. Albany Democrats aren't even pretending to think for themselves anymore. They're stampeding to line up behind Zohran Mamdani--a self-proclaimed socialist who's now their party's standard bearer. The same Mamdani who brags about wanting to "seize the means of production" and declared his intention to arrest the Prime Minister of Israel if he visits New York under his mayorship. And the same Mamdani who doesn't just want to destroy New York City--he and his communist friends want this radical agenda statewide. If we don't hit our fundraising goal by midnight tomorrow, we'll fall further behind in the fight to stop them. == | | == | Let's draw the line--before New York is lost. name: Americans for Responsible Innovation
subject: A Moratorium Post-Mortem
body:
By now, you’ve heard the news.

| | | | | |
---
|
---
[|
---](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=b36e92c9d6&e=a07d75591f)
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | By now you’ve heard the news.The Senate passed an amendment removing the proposed AI law moratorium from Congress’s budget and reconciliation bill in a near-unanimous vote of 99-1. The revised budget bill has since passed the House and been signed into law by the President, but what our wide margin of victory last week doesn’t speak to is the intense battle that it took to remove the moratorium proposal and the weeks-long campaign that ARI led to get there.Today’s update is largely dedicated to sharing how ARI fought and won the vote on the state AI law moratorium. While the debate over preemption of state AI laws isn’t over, we just notched a major win.
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
|
### **Laying the Groundwork**
---
| | | | | | | | | | | The moratorium was first introduced in the House’s budget and reconciliation bill as a blanket 10-year ban on laws regulating AI and automated-decision systems. As you might remember from previous updates, ARI worked quickly during House consideration of the measure to produce [research](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=994f4aabdf&e=a07d75591f) on the breadth of the proposal’s impact on state laws ([_Tech Policy Press_](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=e6cb51a76d&e=a07d75591f)). ARI also mobilized grassroots support with a petition campaign, gathering over [25,000 voter signatures](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=da5dc0ede3&e=a07d75591f) ([_Axios_](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=fa09976577&e=a07d75591f)), and led the organization of a [state lawmakers' letter](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=9a08158c72&e=a07d75591f) to Congress signed by 260 state lawmakers from across the country urging Congress to reject the preemption measure ([_Washington Post_](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=87f01f9c4f&e=a07d75591f)).[](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=a936c829fa&e=a07d75591f)
---
| [Read ARI’s Research on the Impact of a State AI Law Moratorium](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=05166c52bd&e=a07d75591f)
---
| Each of these pieces of work helped to educate lawmakers in Congress on the problems created by the moratorium, voter opposition to the measure, and opposition from leaders in their home districts.
---
|
---
|
### **Moratorium Clears the Senate Byrd Bath**
---
| In the Senate, the preemption measure got a facelift as party leaders worked to move the proposal through the parliamentarian. In mid-June, the Senate parliamentarian [green-lit](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=349b5ffe5f&e=a07d75591f) the proposal, surprising many members of Congress and those in the AI policy community ([“Whoa, Nellie!”](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=c964a3f0e8&e=a07d75591f)). ARI worked to respond quickly. Four days after the announcement, we were live with a press conference of Republican state lawmakers urging the Senate to reject the measure as the budget bill headed toward a vote. State lawmakers from key states where we had targeted US Senators, including from Tennessee, Wisconsin, Montana, and Utah, joined the event ([_Washington Post_](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=6ab9fb6b78&e=a07d75591f) _)_.[](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=19ac56d236&e=a07d75591f)
---
| [Watch the GOP State Lawmakers Virtual Press Conference Here](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=3dd2851c49&e=a07d75591f)
---
| Meanwhile, our Government Affairs team had extensive and widespread dialogues on Capitol Hill. In a short amount of time, our team helped educate offices on the serious ramifications of the AI provision passing.
As momentum built against the AI law moratorium, ARI launched a microsite, [NoAILawBan.org](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=f601178456&e=a07d75591f), as a resource for policymakers to see the full array of leaders and groups speaking out against the bill.
---
|
---
|
### **Final Days of the Moratorium Fight**
---
| | | | | | | | | | | Over the weekend of the moratorium fight, the tide seemed to turn. A tentative deal was reached in the Senate between Senator Blackburn and Senator Cruz on new moratorium language, allowing a 5-year version of the moratorium.On Monday, ARI went into rapid response mode. Working alongside coalition partners including Encode, Common Sense Media, and Young People’s Alliance, ARI helped to organize a [coalition letter](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=f00b9e66d6&e=a07d75591f) of more than 130 groups including many child advocacy organizations, urging Congress to reject the updated moratorium ([_Politico_](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=23d73ff2eb&e=a07d75591f)), and highlighting that the revised language [still threatened](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=977c31eb71&e=a07d75591f) artists’ and children’s protections.[](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=0c7cb227a7&e=a07d75591f)
---
| [Read the Coalition Letter Here](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=89f72c943a&e=a07d75591f)
---
| On digital media, ARI amplified leaders speaking out against the moratorium. When Steve Bannon spoke out against the proposal on his show, Bannon’s War Room, ARI was quick to [share online](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=a92a8e996b&e=a07d75591f).
As Monday evening approached, Sen. Blackburn recommitted to opposing the AI law moratorium, swinging the campaign against the measure back in our favor. Our team went back to work, contacting Senate offices still on the fence about the measure. Support for the moratorium crumbled, and the amendment to strip the language from the budget bill passed 99-1. In the end, it wasn’t even close.
See more coverage of ARI’s win on the state AI law moratorium in the [Washington Post](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=3f3fe0e8cd&e=a07d75591f), [Bloomberg](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=fbb4a83cd3&e=a07d75591f), and the [Tennessee Star](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=c4fe21cb5e&e=a07d75591f).
---
|
---
|
### **The Output Brings the Latest in AI Policy**
---
| From the failure of the 10-year state AI law moratorium to ChatGPT’s “cognitive debt”, the latest edition of The Output goes through the AI policy news from the past few weeks that you might have missed.
As AI copyright issues continue to grow, and AI chatbots come front and center in the AI debate, this edition of The Output is as timely as ever.
---
[|
---](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=e3b75a8ca3&e=a07d75591f)
| [The Output ](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=958998c454&e=a07d75591f)
---
|
---
| | | | |
### **Thank You**
---
| We want to give our supporters and followers a big Thank You for making this big win on the AI moratorium possible. Without your support, the Big Tech lobby would likely have gotten a free pass on putting any guardrails in place during this crucial time in the technology’s development. Now, we’ve shown them that there are powerful political forces at play demanding safeguards.
---
|

Sincerely,
Americans for Responsible Innovation
---
| | | | | [](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=63102a3585&e=a07d75591f)
---
[](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=70f09866bf&e=a07d75591f)
---
[](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=62e4f33fae&e=a07d75591f)
---
| | | [|
---](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=59ad33b377&e=a07d75591f)
|

Did you know a PA House District race came down to **11 votes** in 2018? Not a typo, **eleven votes**. While we know voting is not the end all be all of building and wielding community power, we’re in the fight of our lives right now and we cannot leave any tool in our toolbox behind. That’s why _**[we’re setting a goal of 5,000 new or updated Pennsylvania voter registrations for the year!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111215377/556573680/954866685?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vQ1BELzEvMTEzNTk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNlNjUwMTJjLTk4NWQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fs-ihZvXT-IZT4P0JGzWQ6Jh1YLecQE-9z7CpjC59nY=&emci=83e06340-3b5c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ce65012c-985d-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1206669)**_ | [Register to Vote!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111215378/556573681/954866685?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vQ1BELzEvMTEzNTk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNlNjUwMTJjLTk4NWQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fs-ihZvXT-IZT4P0JGzWQ6Jh1YLecQE-9z7CpjC59nY=&emci=83e06340-3b5c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ce65012c-985d-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1206669)
---
You can do it all online right now at _**[https://onepa.pavoteforchange.com](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111215379/556573682/954866685?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vQ1BELzEvMTEzNTk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNlNjUwMTJjLTk4NWQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fs-ihZvXT-IZT4P0JGzWQ6Jh1YLecQE-9z7CpjC59nY=&emci=83e06340-3b5c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ce65012c-985d-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1206669)**_ in less time than it takes for instant ramen to cook.
Take a few moments to check or update your voter registration, then share this with friends and family.
Let’s do this!
Farah Muhammad
Statewide Field Director
One PA

| One PA is a grassroots movement for racial, economic, and social justice in Pennsylvania. Our commitment is to challenge political disillusionment, protect and expand democracy, and unite everyday people to have a voice in our political system.

clean_body: | = Did you know a PA House District race came down to 11 votes in 2018? Not a typo, eleven votes. While we know voting is not the end all be all of building and wielding community power, we’re in the fight of our lives right now and we cannot leave any tool in our toolbox behind. That’s why | You can do it all online right now at in less time than it takes for instant ramen to cook. Take a few moments to check or update your voter registration, then share this with friends and family. Let’s do this! Farah Muhammad Statewide Field Director One PA | One PA is a grassroots movement for racial, economic, and social justice in Pennsylvania. We empower Black communities through voter education, endorse candidates who share our values, and prioritize leadership development. Our commitment is to challenge political disillusionment, protect and expand democracy, and unite everyday people to have a voice in our political system. | = = * = | | Paid for by One Pennsylvania One PA P.O. # [Failed to protect Trump: 6 Secret Service agents suspended for security failures at Butler, PA rally](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=167963260&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3OTYzMjYwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTIxNTgwMjksImV4cCI6MTc1NDc1MDAyOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.tz9gk0xzOotSc1ZUzzkHYhy7rNv-8WI2XwLTokvCYk8)
### A Senate report found "multiple foreseeable and preventable failures" contributed to the shooting, including unclear responsibilities, insufficient coordination with local law enforcement...
| | [Politibrawl](https://substack.com/@politibrawl)
---
| Jul 10
---

| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=167963260&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3OTYzMjYwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1MjE1ODAyOSwiZXhwIjoxNzU0NzUwMDI5LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzA3Mjc4MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Vc39SE7uBgfH6FBXymuxxm1PqiHSkGlqlX7uZ0AFuok&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

Six Secret Service agents were **[reportedly suspended without pay](https://substack.com/redirect/9197a7c5-34d2-42e6-9764-90c836f3917d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for 10 to 42 days for their failures related to the July 13, 2024 assassination attempt against President Trump at a rally in Butler, Pennsylvania, where Trump was shot in the ear.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/09868c74-b04c-4b22-b2cc-4839c2783177?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **The agents will not be fired but will face reduced responsibilities** upon their return, with Secret Service Deputy Director Matt Quinn stating the agency won't "fire our way out of this" but will focus on fixing systemic deficiencies.
* **The attack resulted in one death and multiple injuries** , with firefighter Corey Comperatore killed while shielding his family and two others severely wounded before the 20-year-old gunman Thomas Matthew Crooks was killed by a Secret Service sniper.
* **A Senate report found "multiple foreseeable and preventable failures"** contributed to the shooting, including unclear responsibilities, insufficient coordination with local law enforcement, communication problems, and inoperable counter-drone systems, prompting security upgrades including new drones and mobile command posts.

## Related Video: New Yorkers say Trump shooting was "fake"?!!
[](https://substack.com/redirect/78b38a4e-839b-4b76-ae4a-55704ba5c628?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**Together with Next Thing Technologies**
# **[The One Thing That Could Derail Nvidia's Trillion-Dollar AI Dominance](https://substack.com/redirect/2eeb0c8c-fced-495f-8e76-8e1ae172756c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Nvidia has become the undisputed king of the AI revolution, with its chips powering everything from ChatGPT to Meta's new superintelligence labs. Their CEO, Jensen Huang, predicts that companies will spend trillions on AI data centers in the coming years.
But this explosive growth has a hidden dark side: an unprecedented energy crisis.1
The very AI data centers that Nvidia is making possible are straining our power grid to the breaking point.1 The demand for electricity is so immense that it threatens to halt the entire AI boom, creating a massive bottleneck that even Nvidia can't solve with a chip.1
**[This is where the real opportunity lies.](https://substack.com/redirect/2eeb0c8c-fced-495f-8e76-8e1ae172756c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** While everyone is focused on the AI software race, the smart money is moving into the technology that will power it.
Next Thing Technologies has developed the breakthrough solution: a revolutionary sodium-ion battery pack.1 It's an industry-disrupting technology designed specifically to handle the immense power demands of AI infrastructure.1
Their batteries are safer, more scalable, and projected to be up to 60% cheaper than lithium-ion.1
Over 7,800 investors have already poured over $7M into this critical solution.3 You can still get in on their current round at just $6/share4 -- with up to 20% in bonus shares.4
This is your chance to invest in the single most important technology that can fuel Nvidia's AI revolution.4
**[👉 Click here to invest in the power behind the AI boom.](https://substack.com/redirect/2eeb0c8c-fced-495f-8e76-8e1ae172756c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[4](https://substack.com/redirect/2eeb0c8c-fced-495f-8e76-8e1ae172756c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

* * *
# WATCH: Entire plane turns on entitled lawyer karen when she tries to skip the line
A lawyer sparked a viral airplane confrontation by trying to skip the line and exit before passengers seated in front of her, leading to a heated argument that was filmed and posted on TikTok where it gained nearly 15,000 likes.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/3c5b6517-5420-4eb3-b398-ffc6086b541a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **The dispute escalated when the lawyer told passengers to "shut your mouth" and "shut the f -k up"** after being reminded of proper deboarding etiquette, with other passengers chanting "Karen!" and criticizing her entitled behavior while a baby screamed in the background.
* **The argument took a controversial turn when the lawyer made comments about passengers' accents** , prompting accusations of racism, though she argued it was "xenophobic" rather than racist since everyone involved was white, dividing online observers between those who condemned her behavior and others who admired her argumentative skills.

* * *
# Abrego Garcia belonged to Biden-backed anti-ICE organization
"Maryland man" Kilmar Abrego Garcia, a suspected MS-13 gang member and human smuggler, **[was reportedly a member of CASA](https://substack.com/redirect/1f8a1c22-db9b-4bed-8e1d-39781d637b95?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , a far-left organization that advocates for illegal aliens and lobbies against immigration enforcement while receiving over $5 million from the Biden administration since 2022.
* **CASA openly identified Abrego Garcia as a member** and condemned his deportation to El Salvador, falsely claiming "the Trump administration disappeared" him despite his suspected involvement in MS-13 human smuggling operations.
* **The organization promotes an extreme anti-enforcement agenda** , calling for ICE to be abolished as a "rogue agency" and working to pass Maryland legislation that would prevent local law enforcement from cooperating with federal immigration authorities.
* **CASA received significant federal funding including a $250,000 DHS grant** for "innovations in citizenship preparation" while offering membership services like legal deportation defense and advocating through its sister organization "CASA in Action" to elect progressive candidates and mobilize minority voters.

* * *
# MAGA Army vet HUMILIATES AOC for whining about Trump's energy independence agenda
GOP Rep. John James **[slammed Democrat Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez](https://substack.com/redirect/9998da2e-492c-4561-bf62-789661571332?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in front of congress for attacking President Donald Trump's plan to make America energy independent and drive down energy costs for consumers.
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/9998da2e-492c-4561-bf62-789661571332?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/9998da2e-492c-4561-bf62-789661571332?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"The Trump administration is saying one thing and doing another," AOC said. "If the Trump administration is promising to lower energy prices, it's important for us to ask why are they making decisions that do the opposite?"
**["Apparently Democrat gaslighting produces zero emissions..."](https://substack.com/redirect/9998da2e-492c-4561-bf62-789661571332?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** James mocked AOC after her tirade. "Green New Deal woke policies do not work in the real world!"

**WE KNOW** this is just not true!

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Promising Signs!
body:
I want to report to you on some very good news that we have received recently! First, the Trump Justice Department has filed a “statement of interest” in Judicial Watch’s lawsuit against Oregon over that state’s failure to clean its voter rolls of ineligible voters as required by federal law.

|
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Knowing your interest in Judicial Watch’s work, I want to report to you on some very good news that we have received recently!
**_First_** , the **Trump Justice Department** has filed a "statement of interest" in Judicial Watch's lawsuit against **Oregon** over that state's failure to clean its voter rolls of ineligible voters as required by federal law.
This is big news...because since 2012, Judicial Watch has been doing the work that the Department of Justice _should be doing but has failed to do_ , leaving the heavy lifting of suing states over "dirty" voter rolls up to Judicial Watch alone.
Our lawsuits and other legal actions have removed _over 5 MILLION_ _ineligible voters_ ...and _eliminated over 5 MILLION opportunities for voter fraud_ ...from voter rolls across the country.
It is a big step forward that the second Trump administration is joining with us...and at this exciting time, I would be very grateful if [you would join with us too](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75157&L=35348&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=6b7d730242d55e52186759e44e828acf66566736e1bae6f943796970e61717b5)!
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75157&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

**_Second_** , just this week I put up a post on X suggesting that Harmeet K. Dhillon, head of the **Civil Rights Division at the Justice Department** , should ask the Hollywood studios and the Oscars about their race, sex and other discrimination in hiring for movies.

Ms. Dhillon responded promptly, saying she is open to digging into the Academy's quota requirements, which say that "Best Picture" winners have to show a diverse cast and storyline, with an emphasis on LGBT, race and disabilities.

Judicial Watch is a national leader in fighting _against_ racist woke **DEI** policies and _for_ our color-blind **U.S. Constitution**. It is gratifying that a senior Trump Justice Department official appears ready to take on **DEI** in **Hollywood** , as they already have in higher education, notably Harvard University.

Of course, we are still facing big challenges!

For example, on Tuesday this week we were in federal court here in Washington for a hearing regarding our **Freedom of Information Act** (FOIA) lawsuit against the **National Archives and Records Administration** (NARA) over the release of **Biden family travel and****finance records**.

We had to file this lawsuit because NARA has stonewalled us over our lawful request to see these records...and share them with the American people!

So, _our fight against the "permanent government" continues_, even as we see promising signs from the Trump administration on other fronts.

I would be very grateful if [you would help us with a tax-deductible gift at this time](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75157&L=35348&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=6b7d730242d55e52186759e44e828acf66566736e1bae6f943796970e61717b5), so that we don't miss a beat in fighting for you, for the rule of law and for government transparency.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75157&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

Thank you in advance for joining with us!

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

body:
Donald Trump and his MAGA allies pushed through an extreme budget that makes their priorities clear—and working families aren’t one of them.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111222929/556580495/155556868?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDQ1Zjk5Yy05YzVkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yL12iewUq9JROp-XinDUHgd8N6BK3zidJ6SKVB8Xjaw=)

Peter,
Donald Trump and his MAGA allies pushed through an extreme budget that makes their priorities clear—and working families aren’t one of them.
Here’s what their budget means for everyday Americans:
❌ Taking healthcare away from seventeen million Americans
❌ Increasing medical bills and energy costs
❌ Delaying ambulance response times and putting rural hospitals at risk of closure
❌ Making working families pay the price for massive tax breaks to billionaires
Now take a look at what Governor Walz is delivering in Minnesota:
✅ Providing free breakfast and lunch for every Minnesota student
✅ Delivering one of the most generous family and medical leave policies in the nation
✅ Expanding labor rights and strengthening protections for workers
✅ Bringing people together to build one Minnesota
**Governor Walz is proving there’s a better way forward—one that lifts people up, strengthens our communities, and ensures no one is left behind. **
But he can’t do this alone. If we want to build a better future, we need to fight for the values that unite us.
[**Will you pitch in $10, $25, $50, or whatever you can to support Governor Walz and his critical work?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111222930/556580496/216031235?refcode=body&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDQ1Zjk5Yy05YzVkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yL12iewUq9JROp-XinDUHgd8N6BK3zidJ6SKVB8Xjaw=)

## Why Does God Allow Evil Things To Happen Like In Texas?
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22843664.11978.1.a8a96fa071ae5bf9a843ef6b3a00ef58)
---
Recently, tragedy struck Texas in ways that are hard to even talk about. With these terrible events that took place, many people are wrestling with a valid question: **WHY DOES A GOOD GOD ALL SUCH EVIL THINGS TO HAPPEN?** This is a _real_ and _raw_ conversation that I had recently with **Erick Stakelbeck** on **TBN** about this very matter. You can watch it here: [https://youtu.be/7clhTfOB7Rc](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22843664.11979.1.a5ef729c043f55526934169dc8d558f4)
---
| | [ Watch: Why Does A Good God Allow Evil? ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22843664.11980.1.3cbfb44966dcac012f5f638942b5fbb3)
---
---
|
---

My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22843664.11981.1.bd724b041717bbadeae99e31ab95de07) is out and has reached **#13 in Religion/ Christian Living / Personal Growth**! **I have been blown away by the response!** THANK YOU SO MUCH! name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: Devastating Ruidoso Floods and Bill Nye’s Big Fail
body:
Plus, Trump vs. China & Shane Gillis Brilliance | WATCH NOW 🎙️🔥

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=5146a75f08&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | We just dropped a packed and fiery new episode of the **No Doubt About It Podcast** — and trust us, you’re going to want to watch this one start to finish.

🎧 [WATCH NOW ON YOUTUBE](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=00d9e252a1&e=567664f14c)
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=b86c06d8a9&e=567664f14c)
| **🌊 Ruidoso Flood Disaster: Why It Happened & How to Stay Safe **

We start with the heartbreaking flooding in Ruidoso, New Mexico — a town battered by floods and wildfires over the past 18 months. Mark explains:
---
|
* Why this flooding was the perfect storm of devastating conditions

* Why Ruidoso remains so vulnerable

* Practical tips for families living in flood-prone areas to stay safe and prepared

---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=d4bd3a6fcb&e=567664f14c)
---
| **🤡 Mark Unloads on Bill Nye the “Science Guy”**

You knew it was coming. Bill Nye went on CNN blaming catastrophic floods on fossil fuels — and Mark tears apart his embarrassing, uninformed claims. Why? Because Nye has zero expertise in meteorology or climatology, yet the media keeps parading him as an expert — especially to young people. Mark calls out why this is not just dumb, it’s dangerous.

**🇨🇳 Should the Chinese Government Own U.S. Farmland?**

Things get heated as we debate Trump’s push to ban China from buying U.S. farmland.

→ Krysty and Ava argue that some on the left will defend it no matter what

→ Mark says cooler heads will prevail across both parties

**Spoiler alert:** Krysty roasts Mark in this debate — you don’t want to miss it!
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=1d02d81988&e=567664f14c)
---
| **🛠️ Immigration & The Worker Shortage: **

Can Trump Thread the Needle? Most Americans support Trump’s plan to deport those here illegally, but... What happens to industries like farming and construction that desperately need workers? Trump has a roadmap, but is it too convoluted for his own MAGA base? Mark and Krysty break it down with honesty and nuance.
**🎤 Shane Gillis vs. Trump — Who’s Imitating Who?!**

We wrap with pure fun: Comedian Shane Gillis’ legendary Trump impression — or wait, is Trump now imitating Shane Gillis?! You be the judge. Either way, it’s hilarious.
---
|
---
| **💥 Help Us Spread the Word**

✅ LIKE the episode on [YouTube](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=b2258f5d02&e=567664f14c)

✅ SUBSCRIBE and hit the 🔔 so you never miss an episode

✅ RATE & REVIEW on your [favorite podcast platform ](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=c3d4eb758f&e=567664f14c)

✅ DONATE to help us stay independent at: 🌐 [NoDoubtAboutItPodcast.com](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=fa05f8a1b5&e=567664f14c)

Thanks for being part of this community. We’re bringing real talk, hard truth, and a little humor — and we couldn’t do it without you.

Stay bold, stay informed, and see you on the episode!

— **Mark & Krysty Ronchetti **
_No Doubt About It Podcast 🎙️_

---
| | Hey Friend, Ever stood in the airport security line without shoes, a belt, or even a shred of dignity—wondering if your orange Vols socks are about to trigger a college football showdown? Yeah, me too. For nearly 20 years, we’ve all been forced to take off our shoes and shuffle around like cattle while TSA agents bark orders. But in a miraculous turn of events, the rules are [changing](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/QmFCSELA_LEDT0ZwTGAyVgmLX9fg78DoQyS9bpXQB0Vx3wKQzBRsNlUXs0zII-rwrRpgzQXf7y9U16nG8wZU8DT979oYin2HD0cQ249kGPUCKbPEDLe-nrAF981JM7XmWmqHX4WqoFez1pmv61jMc7Gy6qc_Wefixw-bLXfIpmP0OqyWe0zkBBLINuclxu2mYZ4rEt2CU_E1jAUTKjm7IwPUPKaS4FgYzuEZ7LYbbxM6u6VT8_ju-GcDVxcxszuhlQeCwwhDfiFd0IcNO64EhK447FqJU6kHu6wp2TVPVyRw1K_jz9LtedkiPXpqw-DEug5xAkR-SM73HFoVWQdyoDUMPcbCbow_Xqlrtc94XvTIpnaYdnc9lvM2uA2yhRkjpWGlZAS1rZ4r6qYxPN1Wssp6eW1NkE9yAILICU4vnhGoELRUfvY1SREtbRJNXR65TtWOd9Asrs6wutO-bB6-ggAwsLMtSFpaJl_hwyFfdlNyO-IfBwL8SZdgrdV2QKO-4SRA-X1gEdDCgNMeX4EMU4d_pxXxTpbXOil_oE4nrNPSEY7gByZVpngeX_IJCDX_wn5J/5pInO_ICW042dGmaixk4hCpchDMd-aNZ/10). Common sense in Washington? Rare. Common sense from the TSA? That’s like seeing pigs fly by. But to give credit where it's due, this magic moment was brought to us by the [Trump administration](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/HwA6iYnYbbXK1B9gGHfzgJNfaeNwkyP1XO1GHwbDsE0YRJpMzxEidpKarBTnaQpFUz9zd1F4yehj5kGIQxFsByyFkl2HWiBtBDUEQcPTDx9tONdW3E-TPzzDM8gRMFukAXmX4WBGQxnIbSBMhLGn4UxVyoxFxbwu9XPrmOPA2u0aDWmFhwxReT0B35QQIwfZnCDIsklfiiq5Y10GssBnI5IRsCdw6OZCNIvy081ew3NW8I17XQ3NuF_HCRGcHpj1SqWQrmky5--Pgx_hAPu10-TF0lxDBX_WSeEwrjtQf0yxlVwyEbG7bzr1_-LqijJ9iDCV4zltxVQ2rqgRAGGsf7WzvSkRzDVsUS6C6tNnNQ2NzlqbFOzBezXZmW1vBFgnEtw84H8sQOkQLhgodclYPFITVWmG-KdbG8q0sz_QPLajKEpd4B_hBecx4Ed_MQn9r4njJh9DIUbOcmW8tbUyDCu9Ina8EldSnX0W8-QoaRoQJSWiDoFSiMoyUx6NVk2rwCn8EgsMag2XSF4G9OIYl5J77UShGchfosZwFmBlmvHy2NgzIg/v4ck_j-ZrBtqqhpvEdvUJm9eqOtPP5cx/10). [_**>>> Can I get an amen, friend?**_](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/rU01xlM7o51L7JyVuEtxBSHAB3-UcHglmXwFulK6QODUPxoJcu0CI9ke6GDPxWW4UKAXlz7sMKb4s0WVLhRF5rqvnYSpo0yo2sVMjhlSIDklKKYUwiWoTL0zE_Z5GbHduEV4pN3Y1EJ8sOOJ2a_tkJatbvs9nS7RMpTGrWACC0EYeiJ9USG4b5HwCBuD8SaD3Frw9woH32RbtcQooGX8Nqw1G8pXvbbqhKHIgX0GOfw31O0eyr8ctphdM28ILb1Ef9iwl_wrbN3YBXxKfUvpdkCJE1ddPJ2s6_rxmckbTfMrxam2Idb_XipxCS-4mvXWmmeWnIUoVctbZadpT7yeWyC9dKBjtTJL4TkPGnkV2bEeF18SgklA2gmlbfocKwLbhIjzfEJlfPrBF_8_k-N8IsKG9GLt5j0xg4DFYMCq9cEFul6PVcmtzBKPnYa9LvzFCwL1ZSijrlPmvkId4nSZJk3IhyaqXxdzonnJsNLjHtBVWK92LUzYgBklxa3H51r6jTZ7BvZe0t2GJOh9-4ubCUctwueFcOiTxaETDE5PJNsSRokL5akx0AMYqoZ733y-JnX2j4NTUdCGt3MC3rBHljDaOQGfELGjJ0wAV4gVSlpiC57hmx9wcTvdP2bQ4jvIvS-WQj0f-OvPTvtRWJrC/D22t6pGypruIZ6U2UlApW_LhdMXC12iQ/10)

[ **KEEP YOUR BOOTS ON** ](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/vCh32ZUE1SKnxdr-6ObkQ6HfL1vO8E-rnMgivDApbNS8f0IJrhsCbrd1xIu4d2XGDg1xlIgpGSC5Sq-cJowFzz0eTcUeg8ZJwGOR5V8qpDz_bDl4LmuEEKq9zchEBHM-V_NnIYkT3i03x1OZvwVt6cc2hvCMETnXlMLL1KzB_JGsW5vlHFRISuDhl53n2dbxdQ7ff1r-xoS3QScZxmaT3FxEl0Pn85cnaB9C6twIlyXqAiSLHOhUWMDN8-ge5dWfcsECzMpAtu0TnLWsQpZpE4KT6uU7d0rBBgR46d8vNsD1ni-Y4BCxXsVecKt_J4OVKuHRyn0Kwedx4TnFj7hFg7iVci6CqzDgnsI-oETprFi9pba8qaqItgqwA6Jw18M31fgeFJE4ykHayFEEg4m-Vql8YIKRt_HWUxe51bYIb1O73sd2RTxUyVHs3W0rmrA3XAvRsFUh7Kz7VlmmvqSypNBeMRhSxvTEuhKGIlWSuUjGWSZqQQKzlzfsCa8Hh-960KMIldcDGBXEhcJa3E2JAtzw6ZwW1IFfAC0f72CyHm1mMvrOJLPdjwL31_km2dXBfCvxfhmo88TAEZUUyzOVF-fvLEvWVGmM-1T4EC9W_PIjtkhfyg55ByHrsPsvUgkYEZRazTj8MiRmHG4DWizH/NbZipiiGiLA9ziSUx8HLzovdtG0a5hcd/10)
---
The no-shoes rule did little to nothing for our safety. And let’s not forget—TSA lost all credibility when agents started spying on [Tulsi Gabbard](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/osqWsBRBdO3VxHu-Joz-T1cmkqIFlmTe3TrjGAwpryyMyzc1GW5u4n-HxKhPwJWlLvGAnc_8tEgN7A1QA3BB7BE4TViRke2FkxrBrdlpCXfISOAXO3xpf3kOwSCLi-5rVhLTgYkpjmOrd7D2XoV4Gi__ghTVuBcAclg6ElmYdXZlfPWRhhHwUGPZM3ohjo-L0k-uTJxyg562UP3nOsPlxh6_9sdhiIzAfuVLn0aM3t7p2mHCGyUyowA23OHYq9UpI6Xs-oMpVcZIHmukp9kuSIP3NgbjE1FSqbVbVMruH_y8XshD9zml4U55Ken1X1Mcx7gSgT08QfWS-EqTmV1uUvsPdfqdG8LNXeCdkUJAfBS43SlvxY729rxxMUt6wXHK6diniO2QywnT8X9Uc1rSauejNNS-pD-IPIr8aQFF3WPFHk8j5uzJjOb_ElSo5f27Z-T22-A3UsUp86kI4_nncuZ8X67WtPiy8cQ0/rELNVVoiS36HvC2iKlHxfpMojEUULmoy/10) under Biden’s “Quiet Skies” program.
