| As Republicans celebrate their dangerous budget bill this week, I remain committed to fighting back for:

**🧒 ****Kids and Working Families:** I’m pushing back against cuts to early education and fighting to expand access to child care and family support.

**🩺 ****Affordable Healthcare:** Because no one should have to choose between seeing a doctor and paying the rent.

**🌊 ****The Great Lakes and our Environment:** I’m leading the fight to fund the Great Lakes Restoration Initiative and keep our water clean and our communities safe.

**MI-03 is one of the most competitive districts in the country. Winning or losing here could determine control of the House and our ability to stop dangerous far-right policies, like last week’s budget bill.**

name: Major General Paul Eaton, US Army (Ret)
subject: The Most Anti-Veteran Administration in History
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
#
Ladies and Gentlemen this is Major General Paul Eaton, U.S. Army, retired.
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to VoteVets to support our mission fighting for Veterans and their families.
Let me tell you why.
Trump’s attack on the Department of Veterans Affairs isn’t just taking away the jobs of thousands of Veterans, it’s also taking away the care that millions of Veterans and their families need.
I’ve been watching the VA since I was aware at family conversations at the dinner table growing up in an Air Force fighter pilot’s house. As did my career Marine’s daughter wife. This is the most anti-Veteran, anti-military administration in history - certainly my 75 year history. Losing 30,000 dedicated, talented VA professionals will only harm Veterans — and this is just the beginning.
It's harming Veteran small business owners, taking away services like food assistance and Medicaid, and Veterans across the country can't get the treatment they need.
But what I’ve also seen is that the American people are ready to push back against the Project 2025 goal to demonize, downsize, and privatize Veterans care. That’s where VoteVets comes in.
We’re working around the clock to stop Trump’s attacks against Veterans at all levels of government, from Capitol Hill to your community. We’re prepared to fight any attacks on Veterans’ care.
[**If you’re with us, please: Make that donation to VoteVets today.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-july25.sScHXv&refcode=em250710-1-120&t=1&akid=34472%2E3013755%2EaGf68Q)

I’ve been called a lot of disgusting names by the radical-left STRAIGHT to my face for being MAGA Patriot:
_“Race Traitor.”_
_“White Supremacist.”_
But **_never_** a weak Republican.
I’m Congressman Byron Donalds, President Trump’s trusted ally in Florida, proudly endorsed to be the next Governor, and I’m going to keep it real with you.
I’ve been going viral for putting my foot down against the Pelosi-led _**[SOCIALIST Takeover](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)**_ starting in New York and spreading across the country, and here’s why:
**FACT** –Government doesn't have the ability to provide, it can only take away.
**FACT** –Socialism _DOESN'T WORK._
**FACT** –People thrive when government commits to individual liberty, the Constitution & free markets.
I’m for putting America FIRST because Democrats have lost their minds. But their warchest tells a different story.

|
---
[STAND WITH MAGA](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
|
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
|
---
They’re rallying around divisive identity politics, a radical socialist agenda, and a flat-out call to put America Last for good, and if we can’t keep up with their momentum, MAGA could be in trouble..
Look, I’m up against the full weight of the radical-left establishment all because I’m fighting for the little guy, YOU!
That's why, with a heavy heart & deep faith in God Almighty, _**[I'm humbly asking you to chip in a few bucks to help me CONTINUE the fight before this day ends:](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)**_

|
---
[SUPPORT MY EFFORTS](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
|
---
Yours in Patriotism,
Byron Donalds

Hey everybody, I sat down to bury the hatchet with Congressman Ro Khanna and we had one of the most honest, wide-ranging conversations I've had since launching Endless Urgency--and it's a must-watch for anyone who cares about the future of the Democratic Party, how to fix our broken economy, and the role of authenticity and risk-taking in politics.
We covered a lot, including:
• Rep. Khanna's viral online poll that "reignited" our friendship--and why it sparked a fierce debate about Democratic leadership, engagement bait, and the narratives shaping the party.
• Whether Democrats should even consider embracing Elon Musk, what that really means, and why tech billionaires have outsized influence over our politics. FWIW... I'm a no on Musk into the party. Don't @ me.
• What "economic patriotism" looks like in 2025, how AI and automation are transforming the workforce, and why we need bold investments in jobs, skills, and real regulation to protect working people.
• The hard truth about why Democrats are losing male voters--and why authenticity, humility, and showing up everywhere (even in uncomfortable spaces) is the key to winning them back.
**If you believe in building a Democratic Party that fights for everyone --not just the donor class--I'd love for you to become a paid subscriber for just $8/month. Your support helps me keep having honest conversations like this, breaking through the noise, and building a community rooted in real talk, not spin.**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..oDdZWbHXIOWgIFIsxOgazSQFe0r1-5Q-CB2ru_sABGI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=167994415)
With urgency,
Mike

Let's invent it, make it, & buy it in America. Pro-worker, pro-union, pro-family, pro-growth. Sen. John Kennedy **[sounded off at Democrat Sen. Amy Klobuchar](https://substack.com/redirect/f9b07d35-9df1-4097-b331-2696f0228a78?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for supporting unacceptable government waste on bizarre woke foreign programs.
"You oughta hide your head in a bag!!" Kennedy exclaimed at the Democrats.
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/f9b07d35-9df1-4097-b331-2696f0228a78?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/f9b07d35-9df1-4097-b331-2696f0228a78?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Hacking away at public broadcasting, public radio, it's not just short sighted, it's dangerous, and the same for the foreign aid," Klobuchar said. "These investments are a small cost compared to what we get out of them!"
**[Kennedy couldn't let it go on any longer -](https://substack.com/redirect/f9b07d35-9df1-4097-b331-2696f0228a78?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "We're giving $3 million to Iraq to do Sesame Street, maybe we can use that money somewhere else,... We're giving $3 million to Zambia for circumcisions and vasectomies, we don't need to be doing that!" Kennedy explained.
"We're giving $3.6 million to Haiti for pastry cooking classes, cyber cafes, dance focus groups and male prostitutes, the president is saying we don't need to do that," Kennedy continued to read the absurd line items.
"That's enough, you get the idea, that's what's called spending porn, triggers your gag reflex. Who decided to do this?! **[Congress didn't, the bureaucrats did!"](https://substack.com/redirect/f9b07d35-9df1-4097-b331-2696f0228a78?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Kennedy said.
Watch the fiery moment here:
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/f9b07d35-9df1-4097-b331-2696f0228a78?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **[The One Thing That Could Derail Nvidia's Trillion-Dollar AI Dominance](https://substack.com/redirect/14cf9fcf-2741-4ef1-9cc5-2207c9d37ebc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Nvidia has become the undisputed king of the AI revolution, with its chips powering everything from ChatGPT to Meta's new superintelligence labs. Their CEO, Jensen Huang, predicts that companies will spend trillions on AI data centers in the coming years.
But this explosive growth has a hidden dark side: an unprecedented energy crisis.1
The very AI data centers that Nvidia is making possible are straining our power grid to the breaking point.1 The demand for electricity is so immense that it threatens to halt the entire AI boom, creating a massive bottleneck that even Nvidia can't solve with a chip.1
**[This is where the real opportunity lies.](https://substack.com/redirect/14cf9fcf-2741-4ef1-9cc5-2207c9d37ebc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** While everyone is focused on the AI software race, the smart money is moving into the technology that will power it.
Next Thing Technologies has developed the breakthrough solution: a revolutionary sodium-ion battery pack.1 It's an industry-disrupting technology designed specifically to handle the immense power demands of AI infrastructure.1
Their batteries are safer, more scalable, and projected to be up to 60% cheaper than lithium-ion.1
Over 7,800 investors have already poured over $7M into this critical solution.3 You can still get in on their current round at just $6/share4 -- with up to 20% in bonus shares.4
This is your chance to invest in the single most important technology that can fuel Nvidia's AI revolution.4

# Federal judge BLOCKS Trump order ending birthright citizenship for children of illegal immigrants
A federal judge on Thursday **[halted enforcement](https://substack.com/redirect/810eb709-3141-494b-8edb-fe87051bbac7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** of President Donald Trump's executive order ending birthright citizenship for children of illegal immigrants, calling the policy unconstitutional and granting nationwide class-action protections to all affected infants.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/622482ec-4852-41b9-a5fe-a7f420c3bed5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **U.S. District Judge Joseph LaPlante issued an injunction** blocking the order and certified a nationwide class limited to infants impacted by the measure, excluding parents from the case.
* **LaPlante found that the policy could inflict "irreparable harm"** by violating the 14th Amendment's citizenship clause and disrupting more than a century of legal precedent. 22 other states also challenged the order when Trump initially signed it his first day in offce.
* **The Trump administration is expected to appeal swiftly,** after the Supreme Court ruled last month that plaintiffs seeking nationwide relief must file as a class -- a procedural decision that did not address the constitutionality of the order.
* **" The deprivation of citizenship,** particularly when abrupt and in contrast to longstanding policy, raises profound constitutional concerns," LaPlante wrote, adding that a full opinion will follow by the end of the day.

* * *
# "Hallelujah!": Hillary Clinton meme-maker gets sentence for 'election interference' dismissed
**[A federal appeals court on Wednesday overturned the conviction](https://substack.com/redirect/d7054e04-ab8f-496b-8bb0-ebf658ebdafa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** of a social media influencer sentenced in 2023 for posting memes that falsely claimed Hillary Clinton supporters could vote by text.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d7054e04-ab8f-496b-8bb0-ebf658ebdafa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Prosecutors had argued Douglass Mackey 's memes** amounted to 2016 election interference, accusing Mackey of conspiring with others to suppress votes by misleading the public, particularly targeting minority voters. His posts made a mockery of online voting, telling voters to text "Hillary" to a phone number instead of voting at the polls. Mackey was sentenced initially in 2023, but had been out on bail during an appeal.
* **The Second Circuit Court of Appeals** ruled the government failed to prove Mackey knowingly entered a conspiracy, noting that posting the memes alone didn't constitute a criminal agreement.
* **" The mere fact that Mackey posted the memes... is not enough,"** Chief Judge Debra Ann Livingston wrote. "The government failed to offer sufficient evidence that Mackey even viewed -- let alone participated in -- any of these exchanges."
* **Mackey, who used the alias "Ricky Vaughn,"** reacted to the ruling on X, saying, "The case has been remanded to the district court with orders to immediately dismiss. Hallelujah!"

* * *
# Jasmine Crockett WHINES about Democrat colleague being removed for emotional tirade
**[Rep. Jasmine Crockett lamented in a new podcast](https://substack.com/redirect/6e73bc46-6913-4865-a5c1-8b2ecf14e9fe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** how she sobbed after seeing her colleague Sen. Alex Padilla, D-Calif., get removed from a Department of Homeland Security press conference.
* **Crockett revealed in the interview that she "broke down in tears"** after watching video footage of Padilla, being forcibly removed from the DHS's Los Angeles conference last month.
* **Speaking on comedian Hasan Minhaj 's podcast** released Wednesday, Crockett said she was blindsided by the footage of the incident, describing it as a painful moment of public disrespect toward California's first Latino senator. "There's no respect. Not a modicum of respect for him, nor his position nor his humanity," she said.
* **The June 12 incident occurred** when Padilla entered the press briefing unannounced and was quickly swarmed by Secret Service and FBI agents as he tried to question DHS officials. Video showed him saying, "I'm Sen. Alex Padilla," as agents shouted and brought him to the ground, briefly handcuffing him.
* **Crockett condemned the federal response.** "It tells you how sinister this administration is," she said. Crockett expressed outrage that Padilla was treated so aggressively simply for attempting to speak. "No one should have ICE take you down to the ground because you have the audacity to exercise free speech," she added.
* **Padilla had been protesting ICE** and Trump's deportation efforts, which are reported to have aided in the lowest border crossings ever recorded.

**Governor Braun report cites hundreds of axed DEI references in state policies.** “Hundreds of initiatives, trainings or grant programs that Gov. Mike Braun's administration has found to adhere to "Diversity, Equity and Inclusion" principles have been eliminated from state government, according to a 135-page report unveiled July 9. From internal newsletters to some professional development opportunities, the purging of DEI policies stems from an executive order Braun signed during his first week on the job, echoing one at the federal level by President Donald Trump. His order banned any state spending on programs that grant or endorse "preferential treatment" based on characteristics like race, and required every state agency to identify and eliminate all DEI-related positions, activities or procedures that previously existed.” ([Indianapolis Star](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/8GWd5qZX6xSaBv4VI83VXiaFdBy6MlGkw-C9SHGPDbZGg7zTLzqGiB0RmGM_dYhYtdxio1Y_v-7fh9W252mdxKKnGDm8-b8mkZ6Npzq-d3jN1Us5oL1yO6tG47d6Sqk_Od0297my933Z7javpMpJgUwXj11xL3squXjUlCs2_-KpBuEuE1XIHGS4ngoJOybe8Eh6g-Dlo-LmjyrSKyNuRre3skdKg6zWZNMPBIAF7-FYno0kAi1aZTlMzesi8HOIbPhlA_40boA_90ycdrjmv4-uvLe5MJvZJHF4RgaaFggJHPHHA49dDHsGopT1rtnc0qgQpcR37CboMXAceNX_tJhIHz3Ih1-28AGvrGcREhBlouWi9aRaC6zOZ6ag2veCh1keXI-1HGuG6mPaQvhMX7tkH2t3fkQGsijAB9ifN4lldO9ZEs7b6Ann6_PbA4c4xvVmsgv8tu1jg5nxQguBMROWRaJ1BfVbOhfFx4ZSgwiUR8oaqLZ3bqfEeg39icbruzovSGWE9Bbvb018pM-MFunPU3Xjb3eKetgFmR-rwSTnDWFham9KL-l32wMzoLylksqJRoYKIyzP_WA5BHLPEbUeS5U-5OeXVJgIoS0z22PgmmTvaAYNJrluhwknkfRx9b5udL7tUi9Pj07WA9dsVWb346JQVmSLuM3HiULpQTM2ZOlq7yrlspTH8D5qK8TUSWd02Ak/Zy_5bRj13mSOT-E6_10_oyJawfAXutMD/10), 07/09/25)

**Gov. Braun releases report detailing progress on DEI removal initiatives.** “Indiana Gov. Mike Braun has released a report related to his administration’s efforts to remove DEI “political ideology” from the state government. ... ‘Indiana has replaced the divisive, politically-charged DEI ideology with Merit, Excellence, and Innovation: a level playing field where every single Hoosier has the chance to get ahead with hard work,’ Braun said.” ([Fox 59](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/GjAdJDB5TrnD-jOaIi-EcnNqeD33WEpACo0G1ObWLht_dmeG4rRigkVnWgAz46d6DegfZg4MU5hxaLDk6T7hfJse5p145v0idzStja2EcZ4MPXYQSmAE3L2RW2wLe5JMHhKXJxosfQvb2PrORupf9857wBzW5O9CFNJtbG3PS9QNvV7PlnvXcrOhgSiInjKxsQ46y2UwYwphgwttz0NJ3-K5o99VN1czwNtHZqogXOCrxlw4Ic7rIXnhR0f_vVr-G86JYAUbJTN_elm4atejEZTLEuiiTAjxlCLMAy1rC593OAhjyzOrumjEGl1Ozd7_dK6dFaYkGMiUAHtDujGdYIdWpF2vGHbqINkrHYRH_kD7r6nJNkUgBi0F7zw7Oftq6STcCmqfRD45AYKo3tN3gnAY1TDtBGJGylGwzfQQ-Y5V7-qBIwGnQd3L88kVNO0joQkjef97sFw0mIXSJV8DkUWObSOtihR3tkaUSO7bE21x88hiyYrXzel4VZfWbzixR8PBSl7FIauHWMoy0TV9M2yzihq2WkP9DSKCLATtyMUVrGtw8hfWXCbMiIOL/efvJFtdAqcpBQQRZ1iWLagMNzBS2g9D8/10), 07/09/25)

**Gov. Braun details progress on DEI initiative.** “The executive order directed executive state agencies to scrutinize their DEI policies to make sure they are compliant with the Supreme Court’s big ruling on race-based admissions from the Students for Fair Admissions v. Harvard case. Agencies also have to report back on how they’ve changed or eliminated programs to meet these new requirements.” ([WIBC](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/UfH8wV060qaV2WWt2dxNefoRtOnsEchsI3_NPimSnzAK1IwTA0ZouNiRnaqJjdnTNCtz-c3FUWMW2bxpPN979OP93bsAZ9xRdRwRkW1eFFHahEm77oQdmBzE-szj3V-ivufpkYhZ-BcA_1wnAWtrV9TC8KjLcvwyNQh1zCzuyIT-AlI0njsRc0_5-rfs53WQLb-8wVPgLpysMCH1wF2utFRUDNGYDYC3UuXqRWrY9jaEUigu4ns9KT93NtMeQUvCWQUFHFpcmrpJHEhpLxS3jDIfHLALwRKY1xrB8F2xRWnkt8J4xn22z43kwZe-Q2J5FdTDJNA-Kd7EDT1PFPBKAuAIc_BW8JcKJher-M5o3N3LJ-u5ac8_m52ZWJJDTXKQzx9aO2UMO8f9Pa9HH3EBCsPeHynwqh_s7JKEzPQ78obfrneyIS8ocFD5zUk9f6UKuLiHIB7wfguwxrhM-DPqZYQ7Fe69LGc/G6oyYFlRo1zm8W_cwJG0DStnH89QY1Ws/10), 07/09/25)

Mike Braun's administration has found to adhere to "Diversity, Equity and Inclusion" principles have been eliminated from state government, according to a 135-page report unveiled July 9. From internal newsletters to some professional development opportunities, the purging of DEI policies stems from an executive order Braun signed during his first week on the job, echoing one at the federal level by President Donald Trump. His order banned any state spending on programs that grant or endorse "preferential treatment" based on characteristics like race, and required every state agency to identify and eliminate all DEI-related positions, activities or procedures that previously existed.” (, 07/09/25) Gov. Braun releases report detailing progress on DEI removal initiatives. “Indiana Gov. Riverbend Ranch has been around for 35 years, selecting cattle that have higher marbling and tenderness than any other beef. You cannot get this beef in your grocery store. Riverbend Ranch ages their beef for 21 days and you'll find it more tender and flavorful than even the finest restaurants. So, if you're ready to have the best steak of your life, head to https://www.riverbendranch.com. Use promo code: SEAN to get $20 of your first order.
**Delta Rescue**
Delta Rescue is one the largest no-kill animal sanctuaries. Leo Grillo is on a mission to help all abandoned, malnourished, hurt or suffering animals. He relies solely on contributions from people like you and me. If you want to help Leo to continue his mission of running one of the best care-for-life animal sanctuaries in the country please visit Delta Rescue at: https://deltarescue.org/
It's Thursday, which means we have an excellent panel show for you! President Trump's cabinet meeting continues to pay in dividends as we unpack all the wins from each department. One is not getting enough attention is deregulation, removing the red tape is going to help Americans and American businesses absolutely flourish. This will take time but the U.S. economy is poised to benefit tremendously. As Putin displays his resistance to a peaceful solution in Ukraine, President Trump has pledged to arm Ukraine. This has MAGA split as many view Zelensky as a corrupt dictator and want no part in continuing to fund him in the war with Russia. Outside of the dangerous rhetoric from Democrats and media outlets, MAGA is not divided on ICE removing dangerous illegal immigrants. Caroline Downey argues the administration should go even harder with illegal workers, as cheap labor creates an underclass that suppresses the wages on jobs Americans would be otherwise willing to take. Suppression of the Epstein files have enraged some in the MAGA world as many believe there is certainly a list. Alan Dershowitz has confirmed there is a list and it is protecting powerful people. Our panel weighs in on it all!

name: John Hart, Open the Books
subject: Your first gift can help expose billions in waste.
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
-------------------------

[Open the Books]
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/566549ef1275495faf58228c54be13c1-e2481f2943f84174abb9760af21444a5/63]

Friend,

In the early days, when nobody else was watching the books...

When politicians laughed and bureaucrats told us, _“You’ll never
get those records” ..._

WE KEPT GOING.

When we launched OpenTheBooks.com, there was no roadmap. No safety
net. Just one unshakable belief:

THE AMERICAN PEOPLE DESERVE TO KNOW WHERE THEIR MONEY GOES.

And thanks to people like you stepping up, they’re finally starting
to find out.

WE CAN’T STOP NOW. NOT WHEN SO MUCH IS STILL HIDDEN.

WILL YOU HELP FUEL THE NEXT WAVE OF TRANSPARENCY WITH A GIFT OF ANY
AMOUNT TODAY?
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/566549ef1275495faf58228c54be13c1-e2481f2943f84174abb9760af21444a5/63]

[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/566549ef1275495faf58228c54be13c1-e2481f2943f84174abb9760af21444a5/63]

SUPPORT OPEN THE BOOKS
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/566549ef1275495faf58228c54be13c1-e2481f2943f84174abb9760af21444a5/63]

You’ve probably seen the headlines: Elon Musk calling out the
administrative state.

DOGE showing what citizen-led audits can do.

AND WE’RE GLAD TO SEE IT.

But here’s the truth, Friend:

OPEN THE BOOKS HAS BEEN FIGHTING THIS BATTLE LONG BEFORE DOGE STARTED
TRENDING, WE’VE WORKED ALONGSIDE THEM, AND WHEN THEY WIND DOWN THEIR
WORK, WE’LL STILL BE HERE, PUTTING EVERY DOLLAR OF GOVERNMENT
SPENDING ONLINE, IN REAL TIME.

Because transparency isn’t a trend. _It’s a mission._

OUR GOAL IS SIMPLE: TO OPEN THE BOOKS ON EVERY DIME TAXED AND SPENT BY
GOVERNMENT AT EVERY LEVEL.

Federal. State. Local. Down to the last line item.

We built the largest private database of public spending in American
history.

We’ve filed over 100,000 FOIA requests.

We’ve sued federal agencies when they tried to hide the truth.

And we’ve published millions of public employee salaries, government
grants, and taxpayer-funded contracts — all free, all searchable,
all public.

WHY? BECAUSE IN A DEMOCRACY, WE THE PEOPLE HAVE A RIGHT TO KNOW.

You’re not just part of this movement.

_YOU ARE THE REASON IT EXISTS._

* Every document exposed.
* Every investigation launched.
* Every corrupt dollar traced to its source.

SUPPORT THE NEXT INVESTIGATION
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/566549ef1275495faf58228c54be13c1-e2481f2943f84174abb9760af21444a5/63]

[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/566549ef1275495faf58228c54be13c1-e2481f2943f84174abb9760af21444a5/63]

It didn’t happen because of politicians. It didn’t happen because
of the media.

IT HAPPENED BECAUSE PEOPLE LIKE YOU STOOD UP AND SAID: “ENOUGH.”

You didn’t wait for permission.

You didn’t need a title.

You became a citizen auditor and made history.

And now? WE’VE ONLY JUST BEGUN.

Before NASA’s DEI spending took off.

Before Dr. Fauci’s net worth quietly doubled behind closed doors.

We filed the lawsuits.

We cracked open the databases.

WE TOLD THE AMERICAN PEOPLE THE TRUTH, AND NOW WE NEED TO TELL EVEN
MORE.

WILL YOU BE A HERO FOR TRANSPARENCY AND MAKE A GENEROUS GIFT OF ANY
AMOUNT TO OPEN THE BOOKS TO HELP US LAUNCH EVEN MORE INVESTIGATIONS

name: Becca Balint
subject: I wrote myself this letter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111270463/556672784/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250710_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzM0YmJiMS1kOTVkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fKemhYelZBt5vjBkKz7sQGvoTAsu2b2QVfyqvIDbN9s=)
---
Peter — 11 years ago, before my first State Senate campaign, I wrote myself a letter. It’s always stood as a reminder of why I chose to run for office. Here’s what I wrote: | | _Why am I going to run?

To improve people’s lives. To bring jobs, economic prosperity, and hope for the future to my community. To push people to be their best selves._ _To get people more engaged. To make lasting positive change. To change minds, to tweak beliefs about what is possible, to elevate the discussion. To bring more compassion and understanding._ _To change the way we engage with ideas. To push people to look beyond easy answers. To make the political arena safe for nuance. To help us find the overlap. To move away from demonizing each other. To build coalitions._ _To teach about give and take. To fulfill a calling. To use my gifts and talents to serve others. To enjoy the challenge of a very difficult job._
---
The challenges we’re facing right now feel insurmountable, but a little over a decade later, every word of this letter still hits home.
And my guiding principles remain the same — no matter the obstacles.
**I still want to make life easier for all of us, Peter.** And as Trump’s corruption playbook is put on display time and time again, I’m not backing down.
**[I’m counting on this team to keep my work going — whether it’s fighting for Vermonters or supporting progressive candidates up and down the ballot who will stand up to Trump’s authoritarianism. If you believe in this work, will you make a contribution to support it today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111270464/556672785/-1695230582?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250710_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzM0YmJiMS1kOTVkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fKemhYelZBt5vjBkKz7sQGvoTAsu2b2QVfyqvIDbN9s=)**

name: Dr. Annie Andrews HQ
subject: Two minutes of your time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio House Democratic Campaign Committee, 545 E Town St
body:
Lindsey Graham has had his chance. Now it’s ours.

|
---
Hey friend – Team Dr. Annie Andrews here. We just need two minutes of your time. We’re counting on YOU to become a Founding Donor of Team Dr. Annie Andrews in our race against Lindsey Graham before midnight. Here’s why this is so important:
* Graham has proven time and time again he doesn’t care about you or me.
* He is beatable: his approval rating is only 35%.
* If we defeat him, Democrats can FLIP the Senate.

But this is going to be a tough race, and it’s going to be expensive. [**We’re going to need all hands on deck to keep this race competitive. So we set an ambitious goal to get 10,000 donations before the end of the day. name: Rob Bonta
subject: Trump & Linda McMahon are cutting school mental health
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642]
body:
[ https://act.robbonta.com/go/4?refcode=em250710&t=1001&akid=1869%2E1088799%2EzP59l7 ]Rob Bonta

I’m back in
court challenging the Trump administration:

The Department of Education should be focused on supporting the success
and education of millions of students across the country. But under Donald
Trump and Linda McMahon, today’s Department of Education is using flimsy
excuses to illegally rip away funding from critical school mental health
programs.

Last month, I sued the Department of Education to fight back — and this
week I filed a motion for a preliminary injunction to block this unlawful
discontinuation of grants, including roughly $200 million awarded to
educational institutions in California.

[ https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250710-pet/?t=1002&akid=1869%2E1088799%2EzP59l7 ]If you agree that Trump’s Department of Education shouldn’t be
illegally withholding Congressionally-established grant funding for school
mental health programs, I’m asking you to stand with me by signing on
today.

The mental health programs affected were established by Congress to
support students in need after a devastating wave of tragic school
shootings — so they can not just get by in school, but thrive. And these
programs have been incredibly successful, with some of the initial data
showing a 50% reduction in suicide risk at high-need schools, increases in
positive engagement between students and staff, and decreases in
absenteeism and behavioral issues.

These programs work — and losing this funding will cause immense harm to
California students, particularly those in rural and low-income
communities. An interruption in mental health services leaves vulnerable
students high and dry, abandoned by their leaders.

That’s why I’m back in court, working to ensure students have access to
critical mental health programs. We’re asking the court to block the
administration’s illegal actions while litigation continues — and if
you’re with me, I hope you’ll add your name to be a part of the fight:

[ https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250710-pet/?t=1003&akid=1869%2E1088799%2EzP59l7 ]ADD YOUR NAME

In solidarity,
Rob

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815
info@robbonta.com

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: I’m introducing new legislation to lower the cost of child care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Friends, I’m introducing new legislation to lower the cost of child care by changing the threshold at which extremely wealthy families pay taxes on their estates at death.
It’s called the LEGACY Act — Leveraging Estate Gains for America’s Children and Youth. If you agree that the wealthiest people in the country should pay their fair share in taxes, add your name to support my legislation today. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/vJeaBMCUO0aX-5FcMhSuwA2]
In their recent abomination of a budget, Republicans inserted a $30 million estate tax exemption — meaning families passing down any amount less than $30 million don’t need to pay any taxes on that wealth.
My bill would lower that threshold number from $30 million down to $14 million for joint filers — and would designate 15% of the revenue gained to offset the astronomically high costs of child care in this country. The ultimate goal is for child care to cost no more than 7% of a family’s income.
To put it in the simplest possible terms, this legislation would tax trust fund kids in order to create a new kind of trust fund that benefits ALL American kids.
Right now, child care costs in this country are at an all-time high. In the majority of states, child care for two kids costs more than the average mortgage payment ! And at the same time, the median pay for child care workers is less than $33,000 per year — with way too many workers living below the poverty line.
This is absolutely a place where the government should step in — and one of the most impactful things we could do to relieve major financial stress for families around the country is lower those costs — and pay those workers a living wage.
You can read more about my bill in this piece from Mother Jones by clicking here. [https://www.motherjones.com/politics/2025/07/sara-jacobs-wealthy-member-of-congress-just-proposed-increasing-her-own-taxes/]
So, real talk: This bill would cost me money. You might already be aware that my grandpa founded a Fortune 500 company — so all I had to do to earn my wealth was to be born. My family and I are incredibly privileged and incredibly lucky, and I see it as my responsibility to make sure every kid in America can grow up with the same opportunities that I had. So yes, I’m proposing a tax increase for me and my family — and for families like ours.
Why? Because it’s just the right thing to do. The wealthiest people in this country shouldn’t be handed loopholes and tax breaks at the expense of families who are struggling to make ends meet.
If you’re on board, I hope you’ll let me know by adding your name to support the LEGACY Act today. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/vJeaBMCUO0aX-5FcMhSuwA2]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/vJeaBMCUO0aX-5FcMhSuwA2]
Thanks for reading and for your support!
-Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]

It all comes down to this.

The New York State Board of Elections requires that we file a fundraising report for our campaign to FIRE NY Attorney General Letitia James.
---
_This will be our**FIRST** deadline since Letitia James became the subject of an active FBI investigation into potential acts of fraud._
---
_**It’s also the first deadline since Letitia’s endorsed candidate for Mayor – communist antisemite Zohran Mamdani – won the Democrat primary.**_
---
This filing is our chance to send a powerful message on behalf of the American people.
---
_When Letitia sees just how much we’ve raised from grassroots donors, she’ll know that her days of abusing the law for her personal gain – and empowering political extremists like Zohran Mamdani – are numbered._
---
_And right now, your voice has the power to go SIX TIMES further._
---
**Our campaign has hit the benchmarks set by the state to qualify for a 600% MATCH on grassroots contributions between $5 and $250.**
---
[**So please, make a contribution before the July 11th Board of Elections Deadline to stop Letitia James and her candidate for NYC mayor, Zohran Mamdani – for 600% impact.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=83f05ddd5ce04aaebbd83ddc4b886c69&_e=D9e6xP3aHgCiLkYZH6z8xYjsyA_LSUIr_C_raxpxP_QteyRWiJ2jOQNaV2NO7wZcmtV_m86JYQ7O5ljsZpMtNYtMM7CZz36vCQr--26_yJFzDDxSsShtU6dT3BFF7bZXschok6PI7pt8YAK9RgZsmX2xQr_rfqo72JlCAxhp05TLv5lMvVgTS_CjGUIYevO5M0cKrMVWsV5EqzeJ2j-zpSp_ZYukrD1tF7yKcfonJpZKS1r6MhI3hLAQtt5dQy8bnEy0m6pGLmUPO00KcwDzJZX-5nwn_RTP7AP-QmVgFwpnTe4pOdFbbz1G3UktXCvoXQI6zqJraSqCzkCPg8zkNVRD-HdZx3svA_sJ9b2jAWIpqDTK0jCXCJeTCWltqQFEgWA7uL3FxZfAjHd_8Ffg8071weAtUHgnk_9ZtcejnxAPAXWtwex1uJjNrsMvWn9TGiY4vnRpyHbQW5yZxT_X3_t-8BJxfsHrA0-ZzgpQu5ezxhRRrqc2CTycIGCrDgh8tIvYAnL6_Lenuou1_Whhk_8cD_j6JB-Bqw7kjIOQp8kxnqSOliUuF1UHgv1gyD7c7Kjp4xzSfqeDH6zbt841WyOXqghKI8ghGyE6wwcczP5bNe8vl1Oyk_iEzdS5lj6UM9ylv16ZlJWvKrgSrqRF0PamwXYNSyiwwyuf9eSfHqBGbFEE3i2CsBn6V-WHALr8FnIGGmVj1Bh5-5ei-D7qEw%3D%3D "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=83f05ddd5ce04aaebbd83ddc4b886c69&_e=D9e6xP3aHgCiLkYZH6z8xYjsyA_LSUIr_C_raxpxP_QteyRWiJ2jOQNaV2NO7wZcmtV_m86JYQ7O5ljsZpMtNYtMM7CZz36vCQr--26_yJFzDDxSsShtU6dT3BFF7bZXschok6PI7pt8YAK9RgZsmX2xQr_rfqo72JlCAxhp05TLv5lMvVgTS_CjGUIYevO5M0cKrMVWsV5EqzeJ2j-zpSp_ZYukrD1tF7yKcfonJpZKS1r6MhI3hLAQtt5dQy8b1CwrACaIf1Jjn4HuDWWRbBWyGebI9a2TfGMSFnYpUY-nUnY1hy9gYnDGPHak5rLfYD8RoCBn4NsTClrmyH_6YMdRKeVW37GtWzuLNiwk90GAEHmELv0mqaaOlJtFCZoZwIvDJcTHQjQC7mkK88laGdmO_arb9N6nGI4sD8pw9cEFiCnouJObxVBVBOqJBi_hs4JiLxqbPmWNDSq2uMOPOQBNTUNIia1PgQAyHSIH4jpAy5WfinjiQrxx1GN8-oL5JI8Tei8aAEupOPy7B0K4baG_V9cW-REtI6mFiqakMhjYeAVYS7b3MJV5x0K-7ZQzKHs_ecGvCh9KV5jf2ZS_RmueuPYrhe4UVLInGqbgfvaSNgrqdfccLz5ecMGMl7qQkN3LmH_ZEg51IOLlgTi9COoZgOq16LBCyp_BLr-WuvHHQmMSPiWPRGYvYecbqsXeNCyVAGJ0WpI5ukyWa7DG-w%3D%3D "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=83f05ddd5ce04aaebbd83ddc4b886c69&_e=D9e6xP3aHgCiLkYZH6z8xYjsyA_LSUIr_C_raxpxP_QteyRWiJ2jOQNaV2NO7wZcmtV_m86JYQ7O5ljsZpMtNYtMM7CZz36vCQr--26_yJFzDDxSsShtU6dT3BFF7bZXschok6PI7pt8YAK9RgZsmX2xQr_rfqo72JlCAxhp05TLv5lMvVgTS_CjGUIYevO5M0cKrMVWsV5EqzeJ2j-zpSp_ZYukrD1tF7yKcfonJpZKS1r6MhI3hLAQtt5dQy8bB7PyYv4lir8Nfz-alMzzhRDePMl-ttrvTVq2Ctelv2omygg19X9GnQ6uri0TF5b-SYxVIeqi6uQGCQpUJBanI2Mb7WtNHiDcSuIlJskcdOUWRxJSKYwv2S4K8L8ErYL9Q5CtMo6b8qxg6KirEEkng7blTbzxNRqVKZi2NAtY3czhgUK_kM-dmJZVSpSrL5M8aYNekds8pUlCEvrrVpVXxfRF36YaQ1jPzysiTqa6CXgp-BdSJJLf1EZAzQf9E4h4PUYega_T-eYzaYJp1nlgoevnVLB6QMi_lCZTg2Kzsw4Yxq6QDGpYnkwrX1zEUDnwmZNH34-iqbS2Ul2xx1AYguzUAYDNMKlRc7ze1vPp4aMQjZEUjlf6lIvwN5nqBBEvkGiLfIZsPS4_OYnFehHxCcFMAOoKKN0o3AQrf1uSxkj2FMYGMi3DueT8H14a1FY5Japu6_JlnUf7Msyn36Noxw%3D%3D "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_

Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

clean_body: This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish: This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish: | | | | | | "Vice President JD Vance" My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance. "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish." It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction. It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC. But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all. I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11. As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you. I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great. "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today." We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win. So now we're forced to rebuild. The Democrat Machine is ALREADY crushing us in fundraising, ALREADY outspending us in key races, and ALREADY building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections. At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable. So here's my final pitch to you: "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month." I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win. Do you think you can help us get there? Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up: | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point. If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win. "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated." Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you. God bless America, Vice President JD Vance | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my "First 100 Days Survey"** so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first. | | | "CLICK TO BEGIN" - STEVE SCALISE | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. name: Powered By People
subject: Greg Abbott is rigging the maps
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
Greg Abbott _just_ announced that redistricting will be included in an upcoming special legislative session.
They're trying to rig the maps to avoid accountability for screwing the people of Texas — taking health care away from millions, gutting public schools, failing foster kids, and turning their backs on hungry children.
Usually, redistricting happens every 10 years after the latest census to ensure seats reflect population changes. _**Texas isn’t due to redistrict until 2030.**_
Redistricting mid-decade is an extremely rare and deeply undemocratic move. Its sole purpose is to gerrymander districts and rig the rules to keep Republicans in power.
Texans deserve representatives who put their interests first, not power-hungry politicians like Greg Abbott who will rig the maps.
That’s why we’re on the ground registering as many voters as possible and organizing communities to protect our democracy at the ballot box. But we need a powerful grassroots movement if we’re going to win in 2026.
[**Can you chip in $3 today to help us register more voters across Texas and fight back against Greg Abbott’s gerrymandering?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250710.cjB0ff&refcode=ema20250710-240213&t=1&akid=240213%2E444211%2EYKj9xL)

name: Team Fetterman
subject: the GOP only cares about lining their own pockets 🤑
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Urgent update here for you, folks:

1️⃣ Trump just signed the Republican budget, which rips health care away from 17 million Americans to fund tax breaks for the ultra-rich.

2️⃣ Before the vote, GOP politicians quietly dumped stocks to protect their own bottom line.

3️⃣ Then those stocks tanked – just like they knew they would.

If it wasn’t already obvious that the GOP only cares about lining their own pockets and helping their rich buddies, this seals the deal.

NO ONE serving in Congress should be able to cash in on insider info.

The solution is clear. If we want to stop this madness, we need to ban Congressional stock trading.

👉 If you agree that elected officials should be working to better the lives of the people who elected them, not INSIDER TRADING for their own personal gain, will you sign the petition now to ban Congressional stock trading?

name: Lateefah Simon
subject: This is what progressive power looks like
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah Simon for Congress
body:
I’m not in Congress to play it safe. I’m here because the status quo is failing too many of us — and we deserve better. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111271822/556677381/658807468?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTNlMGE3YTgtZTA1ZC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=e3_DGF5qwuymbf-Fgd3SF28LtRD-iEzOff-Yjx48Juc=&emci=eddaadce-625b-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=53e0a7a8-e05d-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ceid=22554739) [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111271823/556677382/-92377995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTNlMGE3YTgtZTA1ZC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=e3_DGF5qwuymbf-Fgd3SF28LtRD-iEzOff-Yjx48Juc=) [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111271824/556677383/-1535407989?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTNlMGE3YTgtZTA1ZC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=e3_DGF5qwuymbf-Fgd3SF28LtRD-iEzOff-Yjx48Juc=)
---
| | Friend, **I’m not in Congress to play it safe. I’m here because the status quo is failing too many of us — and I believe we deserve better.** I’ve spent my life fighting from the outside. I began organizing at 16. By 19, I was running the Young Women’s Freedom Center, a program for girls and trans youth in the juvenile justice system. And by 26, I was tapped by Kamala Harris to lead a civil rights division focused on police accountability and racial justice. I got involved because I lived it, and I wanted better for us. I know what it is like to be counted out, to be underestimated, to be an afterthought. And I know exactly what happens when the people closest to the problems are kept furthest from power. **That’s why I refuse to water down what I believe in, and I’m fighting every day in Washington for a future that actually works for us.** I believe in housing as a human right, public transit that serves every neighborhood, abortion access, climate justice, and a democracy that really, truly includes us. And I believe that power only shifts when we organize, push, and demand more — together. [_**My campaign isn’t backed by big corporate donors. It’s fueled by you — and that’s what makes it powerful.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111271825/556677384/1626305413?&refcode=E14074-20250710-ProgressiveLeader-SL-Other&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTNlMGE3YTgtZTA1ZC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=e3_DGF5qwuymbf-Fgd3SF28LtRD-iEzOff-Yjx48Juc=) | [**Chip in today to keep this movement going →** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111271826/556677385/1626305413?&refcode=E14074-20250710-ProgressiveLeader-SB-Other&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTNlMGE3YTgtZTA1ZC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=e3_DGF5qwuymbf-Fgd3SF28LtRD-iEzOff-Yjx48Juc=)

clean_body: I’m not in Congress to play it safe. I’m here because the status quo is failing too many of us — and we deserve better. | = = | | Friend, I’m not in Congress to play it safe. I’m here because the status quo is failing too many of us — and I believe we deserve better. I’ve spent my life fighting from the outside. I began organizing at 16. By 19, I was running the Young Women’s Freedom Center, a program for girls and trans youth in the juvenile justice system. And by 26, I was tapped by Kamala Harris to lead a civil rights division focused on police accountability and racial justice. I got involved because I lived it, and I wanted better for us. I know what it is like to be counted out, to be underestimated, to be an afterthought. And I know exactly what happens when the people closest to the problems are kept furthest from power. That’s why I refuse to water down what I believe in, and I’m fighting every day in Washington for a future that actually works for us. I believe in housing as a human right, public transit that serves every neighborhood, abortion access, climate justice, and a democracy that really, truly includes us. And I believe that power only shifts when we organize, push, and demand more — together. = | = Let’s build a future rooted in justice, care, and people — not the politics of fear. body:
Share your thoughts in our quick summer priorities survey |
#
---
Friend — Summer’s in full swing, but the work we’re doing together doesn’t slow down. **I’m reaching out today because I want to hear directly from you.** You know, your voice is a big part of why this team is strong. We’re facing big challenges across the country — fighting like hell for reproductive freedom, growing our economy, defending our rights, investing in our kids, and more. I want to know what’s at the top of your list right now. **[It only takes a minute to share what matters most to you, but your response will help shape the work we focus on over the course of the next several months. Will you share your priorities by taking our survey today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111271838/556677399/2095982330?refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250710_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjRiNTMyOWItZTA1ZC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=haw0BQQJBM--OCOamA43yWVbPSWZvZzEFgGgpZ_nkys=&emci=31432afe-d95d-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=24b5329b-e05d-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1028753)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111271839/556677400/2095982330?refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250710_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjRiNTMyOWItZTA1ZC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=haw0BQQJBM--OCOamA43yWVbPSWZvZzEFgGgpZ_nkys=&emci=31432afe-d95d-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=24b5329b-e05d-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1028753)

name: Justice Democrats
subject: The horrific conditions El Salvador’s mega prison
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Last month, Kilmar Abrego Garcia was returned to the United States from
his illegal imprisonment in CECOT – an El Salvadorian mega-prison.

Now, while he remains in detention on U.S. soil before his trial, he’s
exposing his horrific experience:

[2]Kilmar Abrego Garcia describes ‘severe beatings’ and ‘psychological
torture’ in Salvadoran prison

While being held without access to his family or lawyer, Kilmar was:

* Severely beaten
* Forced to sleep on metal bunks with no mattresses in rooms with lights
that never turned off
* Subjected to “psychological torture” and the threat of gang violence
* And lost 31 pounds in two weeks

On top of all that, the tattoos that Trump’s administration used as bogus
evidence to justify his deportation were confirmed by prison officials to
have no gang affiliation.

Kilmar was one of the 261 people the Trump administration deported to
CECOT, and they likely are enduring the same brutal conditions in this
foreign gulag.

This is what fascism looks like. It’s what happens when far-right power
goes unchecked and weak Democrats refuse to fight back.

The truth is the political establishment wouldn’t save us. We need leaders
who will do more to stand up for people like Kilmar and hold Trump
accountable.

We have the power to stop this administration, but only through
solidarity. We can elect a new generation of candidates ready to fight for
everyone being targeted by Trump and his far-right regime.

Justice Democrats believes another world is possible, where our government
defends human rights and dignity is not negotiable. Together, we can build
it.

Justice Democrats

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250710?refcode=em20250710-36832&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36832_1203867_aXMD94&akid=36832%2E1203867%2EaXMD94 ]Contribute

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, Last month, Kilmar Abrego Garcia was returned to the United States from his illegal imprisonment in CECOT – an El Salvadorian mega-prison. Now, while he remains in detention on U.S. soil before his trial, he’s exposing his horrific experience: [2]Kilmar Abrego Garcia describes ‘severe beatings’ and ‘psychological torture’ in Salvadoran prison While being held without access to his family or lawyer, Kilmar was: Severely beaten Forced to sleep on metal bunks with no mattresses in rooms with lights that never turned off Subjected to “psychological torture” and the threat of gang violence And lost 31 pounds in two weeks On top of all that, the tattoos that Trump’s administration used as bogus evidence to justify his deportation were confirmed by prison officials to have no gang affiliation. Kilmar was one of the 261 people the Trump administration deported to CECOT, and they likely are enduring the same brutal conditions in this foreign gulag. This is what fascism looks like. It’s what happens when far-right power goes unchecked and weak Democrats refuse to fight back. The truth is the political establishment wouldn’t save us. We need leaders who will do more to stand up for people like Kilmar and hold Trump accountable. We have the power to stop this administration, but only through solidarity. We can elect a new generation of candidates ready to fight for everyone being targeted by Trump and his far-right regime. Justice Democrats believes another world is possible, where our government defends human rights and dignity is not negotiable. Together, we can build it. Justice Democrats [ ]Contribute Contribute to Justice Democrats:

Peter ,
Texans are still cleaning up after catastrophic floods in the Hill Country, where entire communities were torn apart, families lost everything, and emergency response teams have been overwhelmed.
But what is Governor Greg Abbott doing?
He’s hijacking this moment of crisis -- this moment that should be about recovery and relief -- to redraw Texas’ congressional maps to help Donald Trump and his House Republicans cling to power.
Let’s be clear:
🔻 Trump’s allies just rammed through the most unpopular bill in over a decade -- slashing Medicaid, gutting food assistance, and handing trillions in tax breaks to billionaires.
🔻 Public backlash is growing. So now they’re turning to Texas to rig the maps and protect their slim House majority in 2026.
🔻 And Abbott is exploiting this moment of crisis as political camouflage to help them do it.

name: Katie Porter
subject: How do we build a lasting Democratic majority?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39885%2E3422442%2EwfhJSL)
Dear Peter,
Since Trump was elected the first time in 2016, political pundits have talked at length about whether Democrats should focus more on pocketbook issues or on opposing Trump.
**I reject this false choice, because these are actually the same set of issues.**
I’ve always said that voters from the left, right, and middle can all agree: **we want life to be more affordable!** And right now, Trump and Republicans are making life more expensive for all of us. They’re raising the cost of healthcare with their ‘big bill.’ They’re threatening our economy, jobs, and prices, with tariff drama. And they’re not even thinking about addressing families’ biggest cost—housing—because they’re giving special perks to Big Oil companies and billionaires.
**It is a false choice that we have to decide between standing up to Trump’s extremism and making life more affordable for families. Democrats can’t do one without doing the other.**
I’m running for governor because our party needs its strongest economic messengers leading the fight against Trump, and California needs a fearless leader fighting back against Trump when he threatens our pocket books AND when he threatens our civil liberties, our immigrant communities, and LGBTQ+ Californians.
**[I can’t get elected without you, Peter. Will you chip in $5 to my campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250710_1_ak?refcode=em20250710-39885&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39885_3422442_wfhJSL&akid=39885%2E3422442%2EwfhJSL)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250710_1_ak?refcode=em20250710-39885&refcode2=39885_3422442_wfhJSL&akid=39885%2E3422442%2EwfhJSL)
Onward,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250710-39885&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39885_3422442_wfhJSL&akid=39885%2E3422442%2EwfhJSL)**

* * *
Friend, The Trump administration’s Department of Justice is demanding every single record from Colorado’s 2024 election — and ordering officials to preserve everything from 2020 as well. This isn’t a normal oversight request. **It’s a blatant act of political intimidation.** Colorado Secretary of State Jena Griswold has made it clear: this is a coordinated effort to cast doubt on the integrity of our elections and harass the public servants who make them work. And Colorado is just the beginning. Trump’s DOJ is **targeting other states like North Carolina, Arizona, Oregon,** all under the same unconstitutional executive order. **This is what authoritarianism looks like:** using federal power to hunt for enemies, punish opposition, and rewrite the rules. Democratic Secretaries of State are the firewall. They’re standing strong, refusing to back down. But they can’t do it alone. We need to fund their legal defenses, expand voter protections, and organize the public before this strategy spreads further. Trump has dismissed concerns about the location of the facility and even joked about teaching detainees “how to run away from an alligator if they escape prison.” This is appalling. name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: 5 quick reasons
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250710_2_split?amount=5&refcode=em20250710-3139&refcode2=3139_400544_x7n33e&akid=3139%2E400544%2Ex7n33e)
It’s been a few weeks since I won the Democratic nomination for governor of New Jersey. But this race is already a rollercoaster — we’ve seen an outpouring of grassroots support and also faced a barrage of right-wing attacks.
Today, I need your help to stop MAGA Republicans from flipping New Jersey red, and I’m humbly asking you to [**split $5 between my team and Deb Haaland to power our campaign to victory.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250710_2_split?amount=5&refcode=em20250710-3139&refcode2=3139_400544_x7n33e&akid=3139%2E400544%2Ex7n33e) But if you’re not sure (which I understand!), here are five reasons I hope will convince you:
**1) New Jersey is not a safe Democratic state anymore — far from it.** The last governor’s election here? It was decided by 3%. New Jersey’s margin in the 2024 presidential election? 6%. The first polling in this race of the general election? It shows me leading my GOP opponent by only 3%.
**2) Donald Trump is going to do everything he can to defeat me in this race.** He’s already endorsed my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, and led a rally for him — meaning MAGA money from all over the country is going to pour into Ciattarelli’s campaign.
**3) Unlike my opponent, I won’t ever hesitate to stand up to Trump when he attacks New Jersey families.** I’ve sworn an oath to the Constitution, and I’ve spent my career honoring it to the best of my ability every single day — before loyalty to any other politician or political party. Ciattarelli has already made clear that his number-one priority is staying in Trump’s good graces.
**4) My top priority as governor will be making life more affordable for New Jersey families.** I’ve put forward detailed plans for lowering the cost of everything from housing and energy to health care, child care, and groceries — and I’m going to hit the ground running on Day 1 making them a reality.
**5) The stakes of this race are high not only for New Jersey, but for the country.** This is our chance to show the entire nation that the people reject the Trump administration’s incompetence and authoritarianism. And it’s our chance to get started on a better path forward — one where we prioritize doing what’s best for working families over what’s best for billionaires and corrupt political allies. There is no more important bellwether ahead of 2026.
**[If any of these reasons speaks to you, I hope you will split a $5 donation between my team and Deb Haaland to help me defeat my Trump-endorsed opponent in this incredibly competitive election to determine who leads our state for the next four years.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250710_2_split?amount=5&refcode=em20250710-3139&refcode2=3139_400544_x7n33e&akid=3139%2E400544%2Ex7n33e)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250710_2_split?amount=5&refcode=em20250710-3139&refcode2=3139_400544_x7n33e&akid=3139%2E400544%2Ex7n33e)**
Thanks for reading, and have a great rest of your day.
-Mikie
* * *

name: AOC
subject: We don't have to live like this anymore.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
So many of us know what it feels like for life to be one bad day, one bad piece of news, one major setback away from everything falling apart.
I'm here to tell you that **we don't have to live like this anymore**.
We can make a new world, a better country, where we can fight for the dignity of all people.
And that dignity looks like living wages. It looks like stable housing. It looks like guaranteed healthcare, and respect for all of our differences — no matter who we are or where we come from.
**Something special is happening right now**. Working people across the country are coming together to fight for the future of our democracy.
[ Will you make a $5 contribution today to help us meet them on the road? Every dollar helps us rally people together at record scale to organize their communities for the better world we know is possible.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250710.cunSMn&refcode=em20250710-9290-P_FND_EGR_FO&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9290%2E2526796%2EXyGZSx)

More soon,
Alexandria

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: The fight for reproductive freedom just got more urgent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Tucked into the Big Bad Betrayal bill was a provision that cuts Medicaid funding for nonprofits that offer abortion services.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250710-5228-footer&t=1&akid=5228%2E420207%2EK2jNx8)
Peter,
Tucked into the Big Bad Betrayal bill that Donald Trump signed last week was a provision that cuts Medicaid funding for nonprofits that offer abortion services.
**Make no mistake, this is their way of defunding Planned Parenthood.**
And it’s not just an attack on reproductive freedom — it’s an attack on the millions of Americans who rely on Planned Parenthood health centers for critical services like cancer treatments and STI screening.
That’s why I was proud to stand alongside Governor Bob Ferguson just now as he announced that Washington State will make up for those federal cuts in the state budget.
And in Congress, I’ll be doing everything I can to reverse this cruel, harmful policy while continuing to fight for reproductive freedom for _everyone_.
Because they’re not going to stop with defunding Planned Parenthood. They still want to pass nationwide bans on abortion, IVF, and birth control, criminalizing personal health choices for _everyone_ in _every state_.
**But Peter, I need your help to keep up the fight.[Can I count on you to pitch in $3 today to help me keep pushing back against the Trump administration’s authoritarian, anti-choice agenda?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250710-1?refcode=em20250710-5228&amount=3&refcode2=5228_420207_K2jNx8&akid=5228%2E420207%2EK2jNx8)**
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250710-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250710-5228&refcode2=5228_420207_K2jNx8&akid=5228%2E420207%2EK2jNx8)**
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250710-5228-footer&t=2&refcode2=5228_420207_K2jNx8&akid=5228%2E420207%2EK2jNx8)**

name: Dan Freeman (via Democrats.org)
subject: A message from the DNC’s new Litigation Director
body:
---
Hi Derek, It’s Dan Freeman, the new Litigation Director at the DNC. I’m a former Department of Justice attorney, and now I’m joining the DNC to help protect your right to vote. Here’s my story: I spent almost 15 years at DOJ as a voting rights lawyer. I was a civil servant, and I loved enforcing the Voting Rights Act on behalf of the American people. I helped stop voter purges in Alabama and gerrymandering in Texas. But everything changed when President Trump returned to the White House. They forced out brilliant lawyers. Directed us to drop crucial cases. And now, DOJ is standing by as the Republican Party attacks a law that prevents trading massive campaign donations for political favors. So here at the DNC, we’re stepping up where DOJ is refusing to act. We’re going to use legal action to enforce voting rights laws when states around the country violate them, and we’ll intervene and defend your right to vote when the Republican Party tries to make it harder for you to cast a ballot that will be counted. **That’s why I’m asking you to make a donation to help fund the DNC’s legal work today.** By donating $3 today you’ll help us make investments in legal work that will have an impact for years to come. You’ll also help us send a message to the Republican Party that any attempt to pick and choose their voters won’t go unanswered. [Chip in today to help fund the DNC’s legal work and fight for every vote to be counted. Too much is at stake to lose this battle →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?refcode=em_20250710_3918_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3918_22930333_uegwHd&akid=3918%2E22930333%2EuegwHd) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250710_3918_fr&refcode2=3918_22930333_uegwHd&akid=3918%2E22930333%2EuegwHd)**

clean_body: Hi Derek, It’s Dan Freeman, the new Litigation Director at the DNC. I’m a former Department of Justice attorney, and now I’m joining the DNC to help protect your right to vote. Here’s my story: I spent almost 15 years at DOJ as a voting rights lawyer. I was a civil servant, and I loved enforcing the Voting Rights Act on behalf of the American people. I helped stop voter purges in Alabama and gerrymandering in Texas. But everything changed when President Trump returned to the White House. They forced out brilliant lawyers. Directed us to drop crucial cases. And now, DOJ is standing by as the Republican Party attacks a law that prevents trading massive campaign donations for political favors. So here at the DNC, we’re stepping up where DOJ is refusing to act. We’re going to use legal action to enforce voting rights laws when states around the country violate them, and we’ll intervene and defend your right to vote when the Republican Party tries to make it harder for you to cast a ballot that will be counted. That’s why I’m asking you to make a donation to help fund the DNC’s legal work today. By donating $3 today you’ll help us make investments in legal work that will have an impact for years to come. You’ll also help us send a message to the Republican Party that any attempt to pick and choose their voters won’t go unanswered. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you, Dan Dan Freeman Litigation Director Democratic National Committee If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support.

It was wonderful to celebrate Independence Day with everyone who came out to enjoy the festivities in Enumclaw last week!

I want to say a big THANK YOU to all the amazing volunteers and team members who came out to celebrate with us! Seeing you all at these events reminds me why all the hard work and long hours of campaigning are worth it. With your help, we can protect our communities from out-of-control increases in crime and the cost of living.

If you want an easy way to help out our team and spread the critical news that our campaign is the last line of defense against the extremist policies of out-of-touch Seattle politicians, I have great news--we have one more parade coming up!

**The Covington Parade will be on Saturday morning, July 19 th, and I would love to see you there! **Please feel free to invite friends and family to join us for a joyful parade walk--letting our community know that our campaign is the one **_OPPOSED_** to extreme tax hikes and **_FOR_** funding law enforcement!
**[Sign up to walk with Team Dunn in an upcoming parade!](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=906a4700a0&e=77eef70c61)** [](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=cac16840a1&e=77eef70c61)

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: The work.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
As you may have seen, I just wrapped up a quick visit to South Carolina.

Friend –
As you may have seen, I just wrapped up a quick visit to South Carolina. Almost a dozen stops in two days, all across rural South Carolina -- places most Democrats don't visit. Thousands of people showed up.
But before I even arrived, we raised more than $160,000 for the South Carolina Democratic Party – almost all of it from smaller, individual donations. I was floored by the reponse. Thank you for that.
I went at the request of the South Carolina Democratic Party, because if Democrats are going to pass the kind of legislation we need to reverse the damage done by the Trump administration, we have to win in places Democrats haven't won in a while.
I talked about Trump's attempt to reverse the course of American history by taking us backward. America in reverse.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4423?t=1&akid=2388%2E4767699%2Esw234G)
I shared stories about Trump's deployment of the National Guard and United States Marines in California.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4424?t=2&akid=2388%2E4767699%2Esw234G)
I spoke to a crowd of almost 1,500 at a clergy convention in Florence, South Carolina.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-25?refcode=em250710&refcode2=2388_4767699_sw234G&akid=2388%2E4767699%2Esw234G)
I talked about Donald Trump and the Republican Party's betrayal -- their cuts to Medicaid, disaster relief, and nutrition assistance programs.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4425?t=3&akid=2388%2E4767699%2Esw234G)
And, of course, we had to combat attacks from Republicans in South Carolina with the kind of FACTS they don't talk about on Fox News.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4426?t=4&akid=2388%2E4767699%2Esw234G)
Look folks - We only get a short time on this planet, but in that time, we can do great things.
I chose to be active. To step up. That means showing up and delivering for people -- especially those who feel like no one has their back.
That's the work. Thank you for being in it with me.
\- Gavin Newsom
* * *
i️ To my fellow Democrats — don't scroll past this. 🇺🇸
Before you go, we are humbly asking you to support Gavin Newsom's Campaign for Democracy with a contribution. If you believe Democrats need to go on offense, even in Red States, we're asking you to donate $20 to help Gavin Newsom get it done.
If you care about abortion access, voting rights, and the future of our democracy, please take a minute to donate today. [**We’ll put your contribution to work taking the fight to red state authoritarian leaders.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-25?refcode=em250710&refcode2=2388_4767699_sw234G&akid=2388%2E4767699%2Esw234G)
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
